title: Executive Assistant and Operations - Real Estate Team
description:
BOLTON & CLEMENTS REAL ESTATE GROUP

Virtual Assistant — Real Estate Operations

Remote (Philippines-Based)  |  Full-Time  |  Compensation: Negotiable Based on Experience



About Us

Bolton & Clements Real Estate Group is a high-performance real estate team based in the Greater Toronto Area, Canada.

We run a fast-moving operation with high standards, clear systems, and a results-first culture.

We are growing and we want the right people growing with us — long term.



The Role

We are looking for a sharp, self-directed Virtual Assistant to support our real estate operations remotely from the Philippines. This is not a passive, task-waiting role. We need someone who is proactive, takes ownership, communicates clearly in professional English, and has a genuine drive to keep things running at a high level. If you spot a problem, we expect you to bring a solution. If a system is broken, we expect you to say so. This is a long-term position with real growth for the right person.



Language Requirement

High-level English proficiency is non-negotiable.

Written and verbal English must be professional, precise, and client-ready at all times.

You will be drafting client communications, social content, and internal reports on behalf of the team.

Grammar, tone, and clarity are taken seriously — this is a reflection of our brand.



Core Responsibilities

CRM & Database Management

Maintain CRM integrity and execute lead follow-up workflows in Follow Up Boss

Keep all contact records, pipelines, and tags accurate and up to date

Manage databases for contests, giveaways, and client events



Transaction & Listing Support

Support listing workflow from signed agreement through to sold

Assist with Skyslope transaction management and compliance documentation

Prepare and update internal production reports and KPI tracking

Coordinate with vendors and other tea
mbers to keep timelines on track



Marketing & Creative

Create social media posts and manage content scheduling

Design print materials and social graphics in Canva (feature sheets, flyers, digital ads)

Manage online promotions, giveaways, and contests — from creative through registration to database management

Light video editing and posting across platforms (Reels, YouTube Shorts, etc.)

Optimize social profiles and content for AI and SEO visibility



Operations & Administration

Support executive calendar and task management

Prepare CMAs, presentations, and internal reporting as directed

Identify gaps in processes and proactively recommend improvements

Assist in coordinating client events and managing logistics remotely

Hold systems accountable — follow up, flag issues, and close loops without being asked



What You Bring

2+ years of experience in real estate administration, VA work, or executive/operations support

Proficient in Follow Up Boss, Skyslope, and Canva — or demonstrably fast to learn new tools

Strong design instincts for both print materials and social media content

Comfortable with light video editing and publishing on major platforms

Working knowledge of AI tools and SEO best practices

title: SEO Specialist
description:
About Calimingo Pools

Calimingo Pools designs and builds premium custom pools and outdoor living environments across Southern California — Los Angeles County, Orange County, and beyond. We're growing fast, and local search is one of our most critical growth channels.



We don't want someone to manage SEO tasks. We want someone to own local search — build the strategy, execute it, measure it, and push us to the top of Google Maps and local results in every market we serve.



Is this you?

Before you read the full job description — this role is for you if all of the following are true:

You have a proven track record of ranking local service businesses in Google Maps — not theory, actual results.

You know the difference between ranking in a small town and ranking in a competitive metro like LA.

You're proactive — you bring ideas and flag opportunities, not just execute what you're told.

You've worked with U.S.-based clients or companies and understand how to communicate and deliver remotely.



What you'll own

Google Business Profile management — optimize and manage GBP listings across multiple locations, keeping profiles accurate, active, and conversion-ready.

Local Pack and Maps rankings — drive top-3 map pack visibility for city + service keyword combinations across Southern California.

Keyword research and competitor analysis — advanced local keyword mapping, gap analysis, and ongoing competitive intelligence.

Citations and NAP consistency — build and audit high-authority citations, fix inconsistencies, and maintain clean local data across all directories.

On-page and content optimization — optimize service pages, location pages, and locally-targeted content for maximum organic and map visibility.

Technical SEO and schema — implement structured data, fix crawl and indexing issues, and ensure a technically clean site.

Local link building and authority — develop and execute local link strategies that build domain authority in the markets we compete in.

Reporting and performance tracking — own the reporting cadence on rankings, traffic, and lead generation with clear, actionable takeaways — not vanity metrics.

Review and reputation strategy — develop a systematic approach to generating and managing Google reviews across all service areas.



Must-haves

4+ years of hands-on Local SEO experience — with results to show for it

Deep knowledge of Google Business Profile and local ranking factors

Proficient with Ahrefs, SEMrush, BrightLocal, GSC, GA4, and Screaming Frog

Strong technical SEO foundations — schema, crawlability, Core Web Vitals

Excellent written and spoken English

Stable internet, reliable home office setup, and overlap with PST hours

Self-directed and accountable — you don't need to be micromanaged



Bonus points

Experience in home services — pools, HVAC, plumbing, landscaping, or construction

Multi-location or service-area business (SAB) SEO experience

Strong review generation and reputation management strategies

Experience with local content strategies and landing page creation

Basic HTML / WordPress or CMS knowledge for on-page implementation

Familiarity with Google Ads local campaigns (for cross-channel context)



What we offer

Long-term, stable remote position with a growing U.S. company

Competitive salary benchmarked for top-tier Filipino talent

Performance bonuses tied directly to ranking improvements and lead growth

Full strategic ownership — build and lead the SEO roadmap, not just execute tasks

Work directly with U.S.-based leadership — no middlemen, no agency layers

100% remote — work from home with flexible async collaboration



How to apply

Send your application here with the following



1. Your updated resume / CV

2. Case studies, screenshots, or examples of local search results you've achieved — Google Maps rankings, Local Pack wins, or organic traffic growth

3.A short paragraph on your most competitive local SEO win — what market, what keywords, and how you did it



Applications without proof of results will not be considered. We review every submission carefully.

title: Senior Local SEO Specialist
description:
Senior Local SEO Specialist

Full-Time | Remote | $1,250 to $2,500+ per month + Performance Bonus



About The Lyon Brand

The Lyon Brand is a boutique local SEO agency focused on one goal:

Help high-ticket landscaping and service businesses dominate Google Maps and generate high-intent leads.

We are lean. We are focused. We care about results.



Our Guiding Principles

We operate on four standards.

Integrity: We act with honesty and transparency with clients and each other.

Resilience: We stay calm under pressure and adapt when things shift.

Continuous growth: We review what works, fix what does not, and improve every month.

Adventure and exploration: We test ideas. We take smart risks. We stay curious.

If these standards do not fit you, this role will not fit either.



The Role

Senior Local SEO Specialist will own 8-12+ campaigns from start to finish (likely will have a task-focused SEO Specialist under you). 



This is not a task role. You own outcomes that matter to the livelihoods of the businesses we work with.



What you will do:

-Audit websites, Google Business Profiles, backlinks, and tracking setups

-Build and execute campaign strategy for Map Pack and supporting organic rankings

-Perform keyword research and guide service and location page direction

-Improve on-page SEO including titles, internal linking, and content structure

-Manage and improve Google Business Profiles including categories, services, reviews, and engagement

-Direct citation cleanup and local directory builds where needed

-Oversee link building strategy and anchor planning

-Configure and manage GA4, GSC, and GTM

-Monitor rankings and diagnose drops quickly

-Send weekly internal updates and build clear monthly client reports

-Use AI tools to improve workflows and internal systems

-If you produce strong results, you will earn more responsibility and more pay.



What You Must Already Know How To Do:

-Manage local SEO campaigns with 4 to 5 years of experience

-Rank physical-location businesses in the Map Pack

-Handle multiple accounts at once

-Diagnose ranking drops with logic, not guesses

-Improve Google Business Profiles strategically

-Execute on-page and technical SEO properly



You must feel comfortable working inside:

-Google Analytics

-Google Search Console

-Google Tag Manager

-SEMrush or Ahrefs

-Screaming Frog

-Local Dominator or similar local rank trackers

-WordPress, Webflow, Duda, and Squarespace. You will not build design sites, but you will manage them & create pages from templates.

-You should already use AI tools like ChatGPT or Claude in your daily workflow for research, analysis, and content direction. We actively build AI into our processes and strategy.



Who You Are:

-You own outcomes, not just tasks

-You do not need reminders

-You raise issues early

-You care about leads, not checklists

-You think clearly under pressure

-You improve systems over time

-You want to grow with a small team



If you want a quiet role where you complete tickets and disappear, this will not work.



How to Apply:


 

Include:

1. Resume

2. Two to three case studies with real metrics. Map Pack results preferred.

3. A three minute video answering:

-Who are you and what motivates you

-Why you enjoy SEO

-The hardest local ranking issue you solved and how you approached it

-Why this role fits you



*Do not read from AI. Copy and paste answers will be rejected.

title: Amazon PPC Intern – Competitive Training Program
description:
Company: Seller Fuel (dba Toy Launch)

 Location: Remote

 Schedule: Full-Time Internship — Must be willing to work U.S. hours (Arizona Time)

 Experience Required: ZERO. We train you.



About the Role



Seller Fuel (dba Toy Launch) is looking for driven and highly competitive Amazon PPC Interns to join our fast-growing eCommerce team.



This is NOT a passive internship.



You will learn real Amazon PPC, work with real data, support client reporting, and gain hands-on experience inside an agency that manages 30+ toy & game brands on Amazon.



If you love numbers, spreadsheets, fast learning, and competition, this opportunity can fast-track your career into one of the highest-demand skills in eCommerce.



?? The Toy Launch PPC Internship – Squid Game Edition

All selected candidates must first complete our 10-day Elite PPC Training Program.

This is an intense training and evaluation program designed to identify the next generation of Amazon PPC specialists.



During these 2 weeks you will:

• Learn Amazon PPC from the ground up

 • Train using tools like Helium 10, DataDive, Ad Badger, and ClickUp

 • Complete a full Amazon PPC account audit

 • Participate in daily quizzes, challenges, and competitions

 • Work inside a fast-paced agency-style environment



This program simulates the real pressure of working inside a high-performing digital marketing agency.



???? Daily Eliminations

This program is highly competitive.

Participants are evaluated every single day.



Daily eliminations will occur based on:

• Quiz scores

 • Assignment quality

 • Participation and engagement

 • Work ethic

 • Attention to detail

 • Communication and professionalism

 • Ability to follow instructions



Only the top performers advance.



At the end of the program:

Only 2–4 interns will receive paid internship positions at Toy Launch.

Everyone else will be eliminated during the program.



This environment is designed for people who:

• Learn very fast

 • Perform well under pressure

 • Thrive in competitive environments

 • Want to become elite Amazon PPC specialists



If you are looking for a relaxed internship, this program is not for you.



Program Schedule (Arizona Time)

Participants must commit to the full training schedule:

7:00 AM – 3:00 PM (Arizona Time)



Daily structure includes:

• Daily morning huddle and instructions

 • PPC training and exercises

 • Hands-on audit work

 • Team challenges and quizzes

 • End-of-day performance reporting

Consistent participation is required.



Attendance & Performance Rules



This program operates with strict professional expectations.



Participants will receive performance strikes for:

• Late attendance to daily meetings

 • Late start times

 • Missing required reports

 • Failure to follow instructions



Multiple strikes may result in immediate elimination from the program.



These rules ensure fairness and simulate the expectations of a real agency environment.



Final Evaluation



Toward the end of the program:

Participants must complete a full Amazon PPC audit and present their findings.



Evaluation will focus on:

• Accuracy of analysis

 • Depth of insights

 • Practical recommendations

 • Presentation quality

 • Ability to answer strategic questions



Only the top candidates will receive job offers.



What You’ll Learn

Participants will gain hands-on experience with:

• Amazon PPC campaign structure

 • Keyword research and optimization

 • Search term report analysis

 • Budget management and bid optimization

 • PPC account audits

 • Competitor and market research

 • Preparing data for client presentations

 • Agency workflow tools like ClickUp

This is real agency training, not theoretical coursework.



What We’re Looking For



No Amazon PPC experience required.



However, we expect:

• Strong English communication skills

 • Willingness to work U.S. hours (graveyard shift)

 • Comfort working with spreadsheets (Google Sheets / Excel)

 • Strong critical thinking and analytical ability

 • High attention to detail

 • Fast learning ability

 • Strong work ethic and discipline

 • Professional communication



Bonus if you have experience with:

• Data analysis

 • Virtual assistant work

 • Reporting or research

 • Digital marketing



Perks & Work Setup

• 100% remote

 • Elite Amazon PPC training

 • Work with experienced PPC managers

 • Opportunity to become a full Amazon PPC Specialist

 • Exposure to real agency client accounts



Our culture is built on:

Fun. Upbeat. Efficient. Limitless.



About Seller Fuel & Toy Launch

Seller Fuel is an eCommerce growth company that helps toy & game brands scale on Amazon and beyond.



Our in-house brand LakiKid supports children with Autism, ADHD, and Sensory Processing Disorder.



Our products appear in 300+ venues across the U.S., including NBA arenas, zoos, and schools through partnerships like KultureCity.



Learn more:







How to Apply

Please follow these instructions carefully.

Only applicants who complete ALL steps will receive the formal application form.



Step 1 — Submit exactly 7 Apply Points

Step 2 — In your FIRST reply include:

1?? Your spreadsheet skill level (beginner / intermediate / advanced)

 2?? Your comfort level explaining data (1–10 scale + why)

 3?? A scenario where you solved a problem using logic or analysis

 4?? Any VA / PPC courses you’ve taken (course + platform + summary)

 5?? Expected monthly salary (USD)

 6?? One fun fact about yourself

 7?? Why you would thrive in a toy & game–focused agency



Step 3 — Include a link to your CV / resume

title: Operations Manager (E-commerce / Dropshipping)
description:
ABOUT THE ROLE

We are looking for a highly organized and proactive Operations Manager to oversee the daily operations of our growing e-commerce business.



Our company runs multiple online stores and works with an international remote team. Your role will be to make sure everything runs smoothly across operations, customer support, order fulfillment and internal processes.



You will manage tea
mbers, monitor performance and solve operational issues before they become problems.



This role requires someone who is detail oriented, responsible and comfortable managing remote teams.



RESPONSIBILITIES



Team Management

Manage and support our remote tea
mbers including the customer support team, quality control staff and data entry staff.

Ensure tasks are completed correctly and on time.

Monitor team performance and provide feedback when necessary.



Order Fulfillment Oversight

Monitor order processing and shipping status.

Check if orders are being shipped correctly and on time.

Communicate with our supplier when orders are delayed or issues occur.

Follow up on stuck or delayed shipments.



Operational Quality Control

Review daily sheets and operational reports.

Ensure quality checks on products are done properly.

Identify issues in operations and improve processes.



Customer Support Oversight

Work closely with the customer support manager.

Ensure customer tickets are handled professionally and efficiently.

Step in when complex situations require escalation.



Internal Coordination

Communicate with our supplier agent regarding product issues, shipping delays and order status.

Coordinate between departments so operations run smoothly.



Process Improvement

Identify inefficiencies and suggest improvements to workflows.

Help build and improve standard operating procedures.



REQUIREMENTS



Strong organizational and problem solving skills.

Experience managing remote teams.

Experience in e-commerce, dropshipping or logistics is highly preferred.

Excellent written communication skills in English.

Ability to work independently and make decisions.

High attention to detail.

Reliable internet connection and ability to work daily.



WHAT WE OFFER



Long term position in a growing e-commerce company.

Remote work environment.

Opportunity to grow with the company.

Competitive monthly salary based on experience.



HOW TO APPLY



Please include the following in your application:



Your previous experience with e-commerce or operations.

Examples of teams or projects you have managed.

Your availability and timezone.



Please answer the following question in your application:

What would you do if you noticed that many customer orders are stuck in shipping and customers have started contacting support about delays?



Please explain step by step how you would investigate and solve this situation.

title: Associate
description:
Associate (Part-Time, Remote)

Company: Meridian Thinking

Location: Remote (global)

Time Zone: Must overlap at least 60% with US Eastern Time

Engagement: Contractor, approximately 20 hours per week to start

Overview

Meridian Thinking is a brand strategy and customer experience consultancy working with leading organizations across travel, hospitality, and experience-led sectors. We are looking for a versatile Associate to support the growth and operations of the firm.



The role spans marketing, CRM management, and operational support, with a primary focus on building visibility and pipeline through marketing, SEO, lead generation, and relationship management.

Core Responsibilities

1. Marketing, SEO & Lead Generation (Primary)

- Manage Meridian Thinking’s LinkedIn and Instagram accounts

- Plan and produce monthly content calendars

- Write and publish posts aligned with the firm’s voice and positioning

- Engage with relevant companies, leaders, and industry conversations

- Support lead generation initiatives through social media and digital channels

- Support basic SEO efforts including keyword research and optimization of website and blog content

- Monitor engagement and performance to improve visibility and inbound opportunities

- Support experimentation with paid advertising (LinkedIn, Google)

- Identify and pursue speaking opportunities, partnerships, and media placements

- Contribute ideas that increase Meridian Thinking’s visibility with potential clients

2. CRM & Relationship Management (Secondary)

- Manage HubSpot CRM

- Add and maintain contact records

- Track outreach and correspondence

- Maintain clear visibility of leads, contacts, and pipeline activity in HubSpot

- Build and maintain lists and simple workflows

- Support targeted outreach initiatives

3. Executive & Operational Support (Supporting)

- Calendar and meeting coordination

- Scheduling calls and managing availability

- Booking travel when required

- Managing receipts and expenses

- Supporting project organization (timelines, schedules, deliverable tracking)

- Assisting with operational tasks that help keep projects running smoothly

Ideal Candidate Profile

- 5+ years of professional experience

- Experience supporting founders, consultants, or small firms

- Strong writing ability in fluent English

- Experience managing LinkedIn-driven marketing

- Familiarity with SEO fundamentals and digital lead generation

- Highly organized and detail oriented

- Comfortable working independently and taking initiative

- Prior experience using HubSpot CRM (required)

- Experience in hospitality, travel, consulting, or experience-led industries is a plus

Working Model

- Fully remote

- Contractor engagement

- Approximately 20 hours per week to start

- Must overlap at least 60% with US Eastern Time

- Offshore candidates welcome

Application Requirements

To be considered, applicants must provide:

- Resume or LinkedIn profile

- Examples of LinkedIn posts, marketing copy, or other written content

- Brief note describing experience with HubSpot



Writing samples are required as this role involves developing content for Meridian Thinking’s marketing and social media presence.

title: Real Estate Executive Assistant
description:
About Us:

At Miriam McKinney Real Estate, we deliver a boutique, high-touch experience to homeowners and buyers across Western North Carolina and Upstate South Carolina. Our mission is to provide white-glove, luxury-level service built on integrity, attention to detail, and a genuine commitment to client care. We treat every client like family.



About the Role:

We’re hiring for this role beginning in January for an experienced Real Estate Executive Assistant to be the operational backbone of a busy, luxury-focused team. You will manage contract-to-close workflows, coordinate listing logistics and marketing, and deliver consistent, thoughtful client care that aligns with our white-glove brand.   



Core Responsibilities:



1.  Transaction coordination

*  Manage contract-to-close for buyers and sellers.

*  Prepare listing paperwork and support MLS input.

*  Schedule and confirm inspections, appraisals, walkthroughs, and closings.

*  Track and protect contract deadlines; ensure timely execution of documents.

* Maintain complete transaction files in 
, Dotloop (or designated platform) and communicate with closing          attorneys, lenders, inspectors, and vendors.

* Ensure Dotloop/files meet compliance standards.

* Client care & communications

*  Serve as a primary client touchpoint for operational updates.

*  Send milestone reminders, personalized check-ins, post-close appreciation touches, and manage client event logistics.

*  Support post-closing client touches and appreciation gestures; log and action follow-ups in the CRM.

*  Log all client communication in the CRM and maintain clear follow-up actions.



2.  Marketing & listing support

*  Coordinate photography, video, signage, print collateral, and listing pages.

*  Create and schedule branded marketing assets (Canva) and support
/newsletter distribution.

*  Prepare marketing packages consistent with brand standards.



3.  Administrative operations

*  Calendar and inbox management, appointment scheduling, and triage.

*  Prepare presentations, market summaries, and client reports.

*  Maintain organized files in Microsoft 365 / Google Drive and track tasks in 
.

*  Support special projects and team initiatives as needed.



Qualifications:  

*  2+ years supporting a U.S. real estate team (EA or TC).

*  1+ year transaction coordination experience (50+ U.S. closings).

*  Proficiency with Dotloop (or similar), MLS, Canva, 
, Microsoft 365, and Google Workspace.

*  Strong English communication skills (written and spoken) required for client-facing communications.

*  Meticulous attention to detail.

*  Friendly, service-oriented, and genuinely devoted to supporting clients through major life transitions.

*  Must be available during Miriam’s business hours: Monday–Friday, 9:00 AM–5:00 PM EST — non-negotiable.

*  Highly dependable and self-motivated; thrives working remotely and taking ownership of projects

*  Tech baseline (required)

*  Reliable high-speed internet

*  Working webcam and headset/microphone. Wired Ethernet preferred for critical calls.

*  Quiet, professional workspace for video calls.



What we offer:  

*  100% remote (must work EST business hours).

*  Performance-based bonuses and growth opportunities within a values-first team.

*  Meaningful, relationship-centered work serving buyers and sellers through major life transitions.



How to Apply:

We’ve created a unique application process, one that is designed to find the right fit and get to know you. If you are interested in joining a people-first real estate team and making an impact behind the scenes.  Please apply ONLY via the application form and follow its instructions EXACTLY:  
  (The form contains the required steps for résumé upload and the intro video).  When applying, use at least 5 Apply Points.

title: Scheduler
description:
We are looking for a Home Care Scheduler to help manage our successful Home Health business! This role makes a significant impact on our daily operations and the ability to provide the best care to clients by coordinating services. 



As a scheduler, you will be primarily responsible for the collection, management, and reporting of scheduling information. Process-driven with exceptional customer service skills, you genuinely care about people, connecting clients and caregivers to improve lives. This role requires an individual who is detail-oriented and an expert at managing multiple priorities. 



RESPONSIBILITIES

Full-time Position with an alternating hybrid schedule

Coordinate the use of our staff to ensure consistent quality of services for both internal and external staffing needs

Assign new clients to caregivers according to scheduling protocols

Use web-based scheduling application as the basis for all scheduling

Create and maintain schedules for all caregivers

Contact caregivers regarding shift coverage and any changes to the hours of their regular schedule

Keep a “hot list” of all staff that can be placed immediately or used as backup for all call-off situations

Fill open shifts and secure coverage for call-offs or changes in client’s needs

Maintain ongoing communication with managers, caregivers & clients regarding scheduling and changes

Participates in determining hiring needs, as well as helping to train new staff

Be on an on-call rotation with other scheduling staff



**Must speak excellent English.**





PREFERRED QUALIFICATIONS

Bachelor's degree in healthcare (Nursing would be preferred)

1-2 yrs patient scheduling experience

WellSky or Clear Care software experience  (Huge plus)

Must be well organized & show great attention to detail

Proficient with computer use and software applications

Multi-tasker and customer service-oriented with a sense of urgency

Excellent time management and communication skills

Home health experience 



32-48 hours per week

title: GHL Specialist | CRM Automation & Cloud AI
description:
Please follow the application instructions below.



About PropFix.ie



PropFix.ie is Ireland's trusted property maintenance specialist, offering comprehensive solutions with years of expertise across the construction and renovation sectors. We transform spaces through our diverse range of services, from handyman solutions and office fit-outs to complete renovations, house extensions, and specialized installations including doors, floors, and partitions.



Our commitment to delivering the best value property maintenance has established us as a reliable partner for residential and commercial clients nationwide. With decades of experience, including 50 years of expertise in garage conversions, we pride ourselves on impeccable craftsmanship, turning our clients' visions into reality while ensuring their properties remain in top condition.



Role Overview



We are seeking a skilled GHL Specialist to manage and optimize our CRM, automations, and lead management processes. The ideal candidate will have strong experience with Go High Level (GHL), CRM automation, and cloud-based AI tools to streamline customer engagement, improve lead nurturing, and maximize appointment conversions. This role will focus on building automated workflows, managing pipelines, optimizing lead responses, and supporting the sales team through efficient system management.



Key Responsibilities

CRM & Automation Management

Manage and maintain the Go High Level (GHL) CRM to ensure accurate and organized customer data.

Build and optimize workflows, follow-up sequences, pipelines, and automation systems.

Implement tagging, segmentation, and automated reminders to nurture leads.

Integrate funnels, forms, calendars, and third-party tools within the CRM ecosystem.

Monitor lead routing and response times to improve customer engagement and conversion.



AI & Cloud Tools Implementation



Utilize cloud-based AI tools to improve marketing automation, lead qualification, and customer engagement.

Implement AI-driven workflows for lead follow-up, messaging automation, and campaign optimization.

Support the integration of AI tools with CRM systems to improve efficiency and performance tracking.



Lead & Pipeline Management



Manage inbound leads and ensure they are properly routed within the CRM pipeline.

Track appointment bookings, lead progress, and engagement metrics.

Optimize automation sequences to increase response rates and conversions.



Operational Support



Maintain dashboards, reporting tools, and CRM performance tracking.

Monitor and troubleshoot automation workflows to prevent errors or missed follow-ups.

Support the team with CRM updates, campaign tracking, and system improvements.



Required Skills & Experience



Strong experience using Go High Level (GHL).

Experience building CRM automations, pipelines, and customer journeys.

Familiarity with cloud-based AI tools and AI-powered marketing automation.

Experience with funnels, landing pages, forms, calendars, and integrations.

Strong understanding of lead management and CRM optimization.

Excellent organizational and communication skills.

Detail-oriented with the ability to manage multiple automation workflows.

Self-motivated and able to work in a fast-paced environment.



What We Offer



Competitive salary with performance-based incentives.

Opportunity to work with advanced CRM automation and AI-driven tools.

Professional development and training in GHL systems and AI automation.

Collaborative and supportive work environment.

Career growth potential within an innovative and expanding company.

Direct impact on lead management, automation performance, and business growth.

title: Dental CAD Designer (Exocad / 3Shape) – Remote Independent Contractor – Per Case Work
description:
Job Type

Remote | Independent Contractor | Per Case



Job Description



We are building a small network of reliable Dental CAD Designers who can receive digital dental design cases on a per-case basis



This role is for experienced dental technicians who are comfortable designing restorations using Exocad or 3Shape and are interested in receiving additional design work remotely.



You will receive case files (STL scans, prescriptions, implant libraries) and return completed design files ready for production.



Types of Cases

Typical cases may include:



• Zirconia crowns

• Implant crowns (Ti-base)

• Bridges

• Surgical guides

• Digital dentures

• Full arch implant restorations (advanced cases)



Responsibilities



• Design dental restorations from STL scan files

• Follow dentist prescriptions and instructions

• Deliver completed design files within agreed turnaround time

• Communicate if scan quality or case information is insufficient

• Maintain consistent quality and anatomy



Requirements



• Experience using Exocad or 3Shape Dental System

• Understanding of occlusion, margins, and contact points

• Experience with implant systems (Straumann, Nobel, etc.) preferred

• Ability to read STL scans and dental prescriptions

• Reliable internet connection

• Ability to meet turnaround deadlines





Compensation



Payment is per case, depending on design complexity.



Typical ranges:



• Crown design

• Implant crown design

• Bridge design

• Full arch cases



Rates will be discussed after reviewing experience.



Work Arrangement



• Independent contractor

• Remote

• Flexible case volume depending on demand



Reliable designers may receive consistent weekly case work





Application Instructions



To confirm you read the full job post, please start your application message with the word "Occlusion."



Please include the following:



1. Which CAD software you use (Exocad or 3Shape)

2. Years of experience with dental CAD design

3. Types of cases you are most comfortable designing

4. Typical turnaround time for a single crown design

5. Any screenshots or portfolio examples if available



Qualified applicants may be asked to complete a small test case before onboarding.

-Proven track record of managing successful paid social media campaigns.

-Strong knowledge of audience targeting, ad placements, and budget optimization.

-Proficiency in social media management tools (e.g., Meta Business Suite, Hootsuite, Sprout Social).

-Excellent copywriting and storytelling skills for social media content.

-Experience in influencer collaborations and partnership marketing is a plus.

-Strong analytical skills to interpret data and drive decision-making.

-Ability to manage multiple campaigns and meet deadlines in a fast-paced environment.

title: Part-Time Full-Stack Developer (Supabase + Lovable.dev + TypeScript)
description:
About SiteIntel™ Feasibility

SiteIntel™ Feasibility is an AI + GIS SaaS platform transforming how commercial real-estate developers evaluate property sites.



Role Overview

We’re looking for a Part-Time Full-Stack Developer to own feature development across our Supabase + 
v stack.

 You’ll help automate GIS data pipelines, improve report-generation reliability, and push new UI components to production.

 This role is perfect for a developer who thrives in startup environments — comfortable with rapid iteration, independent problem-solving, and building clean, maintainable code that ships fast.



Key Responsibilities

Build and maintain Supabase Edge Functions for API integrations (ArcGIS, OpenFEMA, TxDOT).



Enhance 
v workflows and data-validation logic.



Implement feature updates and bug fixes in TypeScript / React / Next.js (Lovable UI layer).



Manage database schema changes, indexes, and Supabase storage (auth, RLS, signed URLs).



Refactor and optimize the PDF report generation pipeline.



Collaborate asynchronously with the Founder and GIS Analyst to improve data flows and automation.



Monitor and document code changes via GitHub, Notion, and Loom updates.



Contribute ideas for better architecture, performance, and security as the product evolves.





Required Skills & Experience

3 + years of experience with TypeScript / JavaScript (full-stack).



Hands-on knowledge of Supabase (Postgres, Auth, Edge Functions, Storage).



Familiarity with React / Next.js or modern component-based frameworks.



Understanding of RESTful APIs, JSON Schema validation, and OData.



Ability to work autonomously and communicate clearly in async settings (Notion, Slack, Loom).

Background in GIS or Spatial Data (ArcGIS REST API, GeoJSON, PostGIS).



Experience with AI prompt workflows / LLM integrations.



Exposure to Vercel, GitHub Actions, or similar CI/CD tools.



Previous work on low-code / 
v automation projects.







Why Join SiteIntel™

Shape a real product — your code ships to production every week.



Work with modern tools: Supabase, 
v, TypeScript, Vercel.



Be part of an early-stage startup redefining commercial real-estate feasibility.

title: Special Project Coordinator
description:
Hours: 40 hours per week, Monday to Friday, 9:00 AM – 6:00 PM CST (Central Time, US) — non-negotiable

Time tracking requirement: Use of Hubstaff is mandatory for time and activity tracking.



About Us

We are Payment Studio — a payment-services organisation with a main company and a growing portfolio of sub-brands/ventures. We regularly create new brands and will rely on you to help launch, onboard and promote them. We also engage in trade shows and industry events related to payments and other special projects as needed. You will play a central role in these brand launches and event efforts.



Role Summary

As our Special Project Coordinator, you will:



- Lead the onboarding and launch of new sub-companies/brands: setting up processes, coordinating stakeholders, executing timelines and ensuring a smooth start-up for each new entity.

- Research, organise and coordinate visits to trade shows, conferences and other events relevant to payments / fintech / commerce—handling logistics, scheduling, vendor/vendor-exhibitor relations, and follow-up.

- Maintain project documentation, status updates, trackers, tasks, reminders and dependencies across all special projects.

- Work closely with cross-functional teams (marketing, operations, finance, partnerships) to ensure all necessary steps are completed for each brand launch and event.

- Proactively identify project risks, issues or delays and escalate / remediate them.

- Handle “other special projects as they come” — since our business moves quickly and new initiatives will arise, you’ll need flexibility, adaptability and ownership.



Key Requirements



- Able to work full-time during US CST business hours (9 AM–6 PM CST) Monday–Friday.

- Strong project coordination/management experience, preferably with brand launches, onboarding of companies or event/trade-show coordination.

- Excellent English communication (written and verbal) — you will be interacting with global stakeholders.

- Excellent organisational skills, ability to manage multiple tasks simultaneously, set priorities, follow timelines and deliver on schedule.

- Familiarity with project-tracking tools, spreadsheets, task trackers, status reports. Experience with
-tracking tools is a plus.

- Must be able to use Hubstaff for
 tracking.

- Comfortable working remotely and self-driving your work, with clear communication of status and blockers.

- Proactive, detail-oriented, adaptable, and ready for the fast-paced nature of launching new brands and supporting event logistics.



How to Apply

Please apply via the link below:

title: GIS / Data Analyst (API Integration & QA)
description:
About SiteIntel™ Feasibility

SiteIntel™ Feasibility is an AI + GIS SaaS platform transforming how commercial real-estate developers evaluate property sites.

Our mission is simple: make professional-grade feasibility accessible, auditable, and instant.

 We’re an early-stage, pre-revenue startup built on Supabase, 
v, and TypeScript, serving the next generation of builders and investors.



Role Overview

We’re seeking a GIS / Data Analyst (API Integration & QA) to help build and maintain SiteIntel’s data backbone.

 You’ll work directly with our founder and developer to integrate geospatial APIs, normalize public datasets, and ensure report data is accurate, current, and consistent.

 If you enjoy working with real-world mapping data, APIs, and automation in a fast-moving startup, this role offers real ownership and visible impact.



Key Responsibilities

Retrieve and normalize geospatial datasets via APIs (ArcGIS, FEMA NFHL, TxDOT, USFWS, Census).



Join and clean parcel, zoning, flood, and infrastructure layers for site analyses.



Perform data QA on AI-generated JSON reports — flagging missing or inconsistent records.



Maintain dataset refresh logs (metadata, timestamps, and API endpoints).



Convert and format spatial data (GeoJSON, Shapefile, CSV) for ingestion into Supabase.



Test API endpoints and record response quality or rate-limit issues.



Collaborate with the developer to refine Supabase schema and storage.



Generate quick QA overlays or maps in QGIS / ArcGIS Pro to validate results.



Document workflows in Notion and maintain reproducible processes for scaling.







Required Skills & Experience

2 + years’ experience with ArcGIS / QGIS or other GIS platforms.



Familiarity with ArcGIS REST APIs or similar spatial-data endpoints.



Proficiency in data cleaning and joins (Excel, CSV, GeoJSON).



Basic SQL or Postgres queries for attribute filtering and spatial validation.



Understanding of spatial relationships (buffer, intersect, overlay).



Strong analytical mindset and eye for detail — you notice when data doesn’t line up.



Excellent communication skills (English 4 + stars) and documentation discipline.







Nice-to-Have Skills

Experience with Supabase, Python / Node.js data scripts, or REST automation.



Familiarity with open datasets such as FEMA NFHL, TxDOT Traffic, USFWS Wetlands, or Census TIGER.



Exposure to AI / LLM data QA pipelines.



Comfortable using Notion, ClickUp, or GitHub for workflow management.









Why Join SiteIntel™

Work with real GIS and open data powering a live SaaS product.



See your datasets feed directly into AI-generated commercial-feasibility reports.



Learn how AI, GIS, and automation intersect in a modern data workflow.



Contribute to a product that makes professional feasibility accessible worldwide.



Enjoy flexible remote hours, direct collaboration with the founder, and startup growth potential.







How to Apply

Please visit this link: 

Fill out the form and we will get back to you shortly after reviewing your application. 



Applications without sample work or API experience will not be considered.



Thank you.

title: GoHighLevel Specialist
description:
Remote Work Requirements (Non-Negotiable)

* Work Hours: Availability from 9 AM to 6 PM US CST, Monday–Friday

* Reliable Technology: Stable internet connection (min. 25 Mbps down/up) and a dedicated computer

* Hubstaff Usage: Mandatory time-tracking and productivity monitoring via Hubstaff

* Video Meetings: Cameras must remain on for all video calls

* Full-Time Focus: This is a full-time role; no simultaneous employment with other clients or employers



Buzz Digital Agency is seeking a dedicated GoHighLevel Automation & Integrations Specialist to join our fully remote team in the Philippines. You will architect, deploy, and maintain complex automations that power our clients’ marketing funnels and internal workflows. This role is critical to ensuring seamless data flows, on-time campaign launches, and high deliverability across SMS,
, and voice channels.



If you’re passionate about automation, have a knack for problem-solving, and thrive in a fast-paced digital-marketing environment, we want to hear from you!



Responsibilities

* GoHighLevel Sub-Account Management: End-to-end setup and maintenance of client sub-accounts, including custom domain configuration and SMS/phone A2P registration

* Automation Design & Implementation: Build, test, and deploy automated workflows using n8n, 
, and Zapier to streamline lead capture, follow-up sequences, and data syncing

* API Integration & Logic Flow: Develop and maintain robust integrations via APIs; design clear logic flows and process maps for complex automation scenarios

* Ongoing Monitoring & Optimization: Regularly audit existing automations and integrations for performance, security, and accuracy; implement improvements as needed

* Documentation & Training: Create and update technical documentation; train internal tea
mbers and clients on platform features and best practices

* Troubleshooting & Support: Serve as the escalation point for any automation failures or platform outages; resolve issues swiftly to minimize downtime



Additional best-practice responsibilities:

* Conduct quarterly platform health checks and provide performance reports

* Collaborate with marketing and sales teams to align automations with campaign objectives

* Research and pilot emerging automation tools and techniques



Qualifications

* Experience: 3+ years in marketing automation or system integration roles, with demonstrated expertise on GoHighLevel

* Technical Skills:

    * Advanced proficiency with n8n and 
 for workflow automation

    * Strong API development/integration experience (RESTful services, webhooks)

    * Solid understanding of domain DNS, SSL, and SMS/A2P registration processes

* Soft Skills: Excellent problem-solving, clear written and verbal English communication, and strong documentation practices

* Tools: Comfortable using Hubstaff (or equivalent), Slack/Teams, and project-management platforms





Apply at

title: Customer Support Manager (Supplement Brand)
description:
FULL-TIME, LONG-TERM, EXCLUSIVE ROLE ONLY

No part-time work, agency setups, or side commitments.



We are a fast-growing supplement brand looking for a Customer Support Manager who is genuinely obsessed with efficiency and continuous improvement. This is not a role for someone who just wants to maintain the status quo or follow a manual. We need a leader who looks at a process and immediately thinks of three ways to make it faster, smarter, and better.

You will be responsible for building and scaling our support operations. We want someone who takes deep pride in ownership, turns chaos into systems, and ensures our customer experience is a competitive advantage. If you are a builder who thrives on fixing broken workflows and implementing high-level strategy, we want to talk to you.



What You Will Do



* Optimize & Implement: You will be the architect of our CS roadmap, constantly auditing and improving systems to ensure we stay ahead of our growth.

* System Ownership: Beyond just managing tickets, you will create, improve, and maintain our entire library of SOPs, macros, and internal documentation.

* Problem Identification: You will proactively identify patterns in customer friction and work across departments to solve issues at the root.

* Tech Stack Management: Take full ownership of our tools (Gorgias, Shopify, etc.), ensuring all automations, rules, and integrations are running at peak performance.

* Accountability: Own the department KPIs (CSAT, Resolution Time, Efficiency) and use data to drive every decision you make.

* Hiring: Hire, promote, and remove underperformers to maintain a high-output, accountable team culture

* Lead by Example: Set the standard for communication and problem-solving, eventually leading the hiring and training as the team scales.



Qualifications



* 5+ years leading customer service teams of 15+ in a fast-paced eCommerce environment

* Obsession with Improvement: You must be able to demonstrate how you have personally improved a system, workflow, or department in a previous role.

* Shopify Expert: Strong hands-on experience with Shopify and its ecosystem of apps.

* Tool Mastery: Advanced proficiency in Gorgias, Zendesk, or similar platforms, specifically in building out automations and complex workflows.

* Strategic Thinker: Ability to translate raw data into actionable process changes.

* Communication: Exceptional written and verbal English with the ability to lead with authority and clarity.

* Commitment: Willingness to commit full-time and exclusively to our brand for the long term.



This Role is Not for You If:



* You view this as "just a job" rather than something you take personal pride in building

* You need step-by-step direction and shy away from strategic decisions

* You're uncomfortable holding people accountable or addressing underperformance

* You present problems instead of solving them

* You want a comfortable, predictable 9-to-5 job



Click here to apply : 
/jobs/
customer-support-manager

title: Video Editor for Mobile App TikTok & Social Media Content (CapCut)
description:
Description:



We're a growing fitness/screen time app looking for a skilled video editor to produce short-form content for TikTok, Instagram Reels, and Meta ads.



What you'll be doing:

Editing 5-10 short-form videos per day (5-30 seconds each)

Compositing multiple video layers in CapCut (masking, overlays, layering)

Adding text overlays, captions, and hooks to videos

Syncing visual elements to match on-screen action

Light color correction and speed adjustments

Exporting in correct formats/dimensions for TikTok, IG Reels, and Meta ads



Requirements:

Strong experience with CapCut (desktop version required — must know masking, layers, blend modes)

Understanding of short-form content editing (pacing, hooks, trends)

Able to follow templates and SOPs once trained

Reliable internet and own computer

Available to work 4-6 hours/day, Monday-Friday

Fast turnaround — same-day delivery on most edits

Good communication in English

Attention to detail is critical for this role. Please make the title of your application say "Treehouse" to be considered for the position.



Nice to have:

Experience editing TikTok/Reels content for apps or brands

Familiarity with AI-generated video content

Basic motion graphics or After Effects skills



About the role:

This is an ongoing part-time position with potential to grow to full-time. You'll receive raw footage and assets, follow a clear workflow, and deliver finished videos ready to post. We value speed, consistency, and attention to detail over flashy effects.



To apply:

Please include a link to your portfolio or examples of TikTok/Reels content you've edited. Applications without work samples will not be reviewed.

title: Customer Care Specialist (Ecommerce & Marketplace Support)
description:
Customer Care Specialist (Ecommerce & Marketplace Support)

Full-time / Part-time • Remote • Flexible Shifts

A Global Fashion Accessories Brand



About the Company 



We are a fast-growing global fashion accessories brand serving customers worldwide through our ecommerce store, 2000+ retail stores and international marketplaces. Our main sales channels include Shopify and Amazon, and we are focused on delivering a premium customer experience to our global community.

To support our growing customer base, we are looking for Customer Care Specialists who are passionate about helping customers and enjoy working in fast-paced ecommerce environments.



This is a fully remote position, and we are hiring both full-time and part-time tea
mbers who can work flexible shifts.



---



Your Responsibilities



* Provide friendly and professional customer support via
 and helpdesk systems

* Manage customer inquiries related to orders, shipping, returns, exchanges, and product information

* Support customers purchasing through Shopify ecommerce and Amazon marketplaces

* Handle tickets through Zendesk or similar support platforms

* Ensure every customer interaction reflects the company’s brand voice and customer-first mindset

* Collaborate with internal teams to resolve order or fulfillment issues

* Identify recurring customer questions and help improve support processes

* Maintain high response quality and timely ticket resolution



---



What We're Looking For:



* Previous experience in customer service or customer support

* Experience with Zendesk, Shopify, or Amazon Seller Central is a strong advantage

* Interest in fashion, ecommerce, or consumer brands

* Excellent written communication skills in English

* Strong problem-solving skills and attention to detail

* Ability to work independently in a remote environment

* Availability to work flexible shifts



---



What We Offer



Fully remote role— work from anywhere

* Flexible schedule (full-time or part-time)

* Supportive and collaborative team environment

* Opportunities to grow with the company as it scales internationally



---

We are looking forward hearing from amazing talented new staff members!

title: Wordpress Website Designer / Builder
description:
I need a website designer to create a minimal website design for three pages plus header/footer:



Home page

Service page

Location page



The site will eventually be built in Elementor Pro - this project is just the design part, so every part of the design must be achievable in Elementor Pro. Custom code is fine where needed, but I do not want any extra plugins used apart from something simple like a code snippets plugin.



Important requirements



You must have at least two years of experience designing and building websites

You must be able to show live examples of your previous work

You must not use templates

You must be creative and able to produce a clean, minimal design

You must be comfortable designing with Elementor Pro in mind

You must be happy to work within this budget



Everything on the current pages will need to be included in the redesign. This is not a cut down job. The aim is to improve the layout and visual style while keeping all existing content and sections.



I have the current site and an example site that shows the minimal style the customer likes. This is only for direction and must not be copied. The design should be inspired by the style, not duplicated.



Deadline

The design needs to be completed by Thursday COB.



Please note

This budget is for the design only. Once the design is approved, I will post the separate project for building the site.



When you reply, please include



Examples of relevant work

How long you have been working with Elementor Pro

Confirmation that you do not use templates

Confirmation that your design can be built in Elementor Pro without additional plugins.

title: AI Visual Content Operator
description:
**Part-time / Freelance / Remote**



We run LinkedIn marketing for 40+ clients. We create psychology-driven content and produce custom graphics for every piece of content we publish. This role owns that visual production pipeline end to end. If you know Gemini and Nano Banana properly, this was built for you.



**What you'll actually do**



- Take written LinkedIn posts and carousels and turn them into structured visual briefs using our custom Gemini Gem

- Run prompts through Nano Banana and QA every image — catching hallucinations, brand inconsistencies, bad crops, and contrast issues before they reach the client

- Handle client revision requests fast and cleanly — "change the background", "make it more professional" — without going back and forth five times

- Maintain brand consistency across 40+ clients — every client has their own colours, style, and tone and you respect that



**Must haves**



- Proficient with Google Gemini — including Gems, system prompts, and Ultra-level outputs

- Hands-on experience with Nano Banana — not just "used it once"

- Strong eye for visual QA — can spot what's off without being told

- Understands LinkedIn graphic requirements (4:5 ratio, text zones, contrast rules)

- Prompt engineering instincts — knows why something hallucinated and how to fix it

- Comfortable working in a fast-paced agency with multiple clients on the go



**Nice to haves**



- 
 experience — we automate parts of this pipeline

- Canva or basic design tool familiarity for quick overlay edits

- Background in LinkedIn content or social media

- Comfortable reading and editing structured JSON files



**What this is not**



This is not a graphic design role — you're operating AI tools, not designing from scratch in Figma. This is not for someone who's dabbled with AI image tools. We need someone who moves fast and knows what they're doing. This is not a creative direction role — the brief comes from us, your job is precision execution.



**To apply**



Send 3 examples of visuals you've produced using Gemini and Nano Banana — ideally LinkedIn-format graphics. Tell us what the brief was and what you changed to get it right. No CV without examples will be considered.

title: Tracking & Digital Marketing Specialist (B2B Focus)
description:
Job Description:

We are seeking a detail-oriented and technically skilled Tracking & Digital Marketing Specialist to set up and manage robust tracking infrastructures for our B2B clients. The ideal candidate will be responsible for implementing and configuring website tracking systems to ensure accurate data collection, performance measurement, and actionable insights.



Key Responsibilities:

- Implement website tracking using tools such as Google Tag Manager, Meta 
) Pixel, LinkedIn Insight Tag, and other relevant platforms.

- Configure and optimize analytics tools (e.g., Google Analytics) to provide detailed insights into website traffic, conversions, and user behavior.

- Ensure accurate event tracking, conversion tracking, and cross-platform data consistency.

- Provide clear documentation and step-by-step instructions for clients regarding tracking setups and best practices.

- Collaborate on SEO and Google Ads (SEA) initiatives where tracking and performance marketing overlap.

- Support campaign tracking for paid media, including media buying, ad placement, and optimization (if applicable).

- Analyze data and generate meaningful reports to help clients make data-driven decisions.



Requirements:

- Strong hands-on experience with website tracking implementation and tag management systems.

- Solid understanding of Google Analytics and performance marketing tracking principles.

- Experience working with B2B clients.

- Technical proficiency in implementing tracking codes, debugging, and ensuring data accuracy.

- Knowledge of SEO and Google Ads (SEA); ability to connect tracking with campaign optimization.

- Analytical mindset with the ability to interpret data and provide actionable recommendations.

- Experience in media buying and campaign optimization is a strong plus.

- Ability to create clear documentation and communicate technical concepts effectively.

- German language skills are an advantage but not required.



Profile:

- Structured, detail-oriented, and proactive.

- Comfortable working independently and efficiently setting up complete tracking infrastructures.

- Strong problem-solving skills with a focus on data accuracy and performance improvement.

title: Accounting (Canadian accounting practices)
description:
Job Title: Accountant - Data Science Expert (PO and Reconciliation)



Job Summary:

Seeking a detail-oriented Accountant with expertise in Canadian accounting practices and advanced data science skills. Key role in optimizing Purchase Order (PO) processes, managing accounting coding, and conducting reconciliations. A strategic mindset, data manipulation capabilities, and commitment to accuracy are required.



Responsibilities:



Financial Accounting:



Ensure compliance with Canadian accounting standards in daily transactions.

Prepare comprehensive financial statements (income, balance sheets, cash flow).



Data Analysis and Manipulation:



Use advanced data science techniques to analyze large datasets.

Implement data-driven models to optimize financial processes, focusing on PO workflows.



Purchase Order Process and Accounting Coding:



Lead PO process implementation and management.

Develop and maintain efficient accounting coding systems.



Reconciliation of Spreadsheets:



Conduct regular reconciliations of financial data.

Investigate and resolve discrepancies through data science automation.



Budgeting and Forecasting:



Collaborate on budget development with cross-functional teams.

Analyze variances between actual and budgeted/forecasted figures.



Compliance and Reporting:



Stay updated on Canadian accounting regulations.

Prepare and submit accurate financial reports to regulatory bodies.



Technology Integration:



Leverage advanced data science tools for financial reporting.

Collaborate with IT teams to integrate financial and data systems.



Strategic Advisory:



Provide strategic insights based on data analysis.



Continuous Improvement:



Identify and implement process improvements in finance and accounting.



Qualifications:



Professional accounting designation (e.g., CPA) is preferred.

Proven experience in accounting roles, and a strong understanding of Canadian practices.

Proficient in data science tools and programming languages (Python, R, SQL).

Hands-on experience in implementing and managing PO processes.

Excellent analytical and problem-solving skills.

Strong communication skills, and ability to present complex data to non-technical stakeholders.

Familiarity with accounting software and ERP systems.

Ability to work independently and collaboratively in a dynamic environment.

If you're a motivated professional with a passion for combining accounting expertise with data science skills and have a proven track record in implementing PO processes and conducting meticulous reconciliations, apply for this exciting opportunity. Please provide us with a brief cover letter on why we should hire you, your rate, and an updated resume.



For faster hiring: Post a link to your Resume when applying

title: Part-Time Social Media VA — LinkedIn & Instagram | Consulting Brand | Growth Role
description:
About the Company

Stonefly Consulting Group is a boutique consulting firm helping small and mid-sized businesses improve their sales process, develop stronger leadership, and implement AI-powered workflow automation. Our tagline is simple: Process beats pressure every time. We're a startup founded by a 15-year executive, and we're building something intentional — a brand that stands for clarity, results, and real business transformation.

The Role

We're looking for a part-time Social Media VA to own the execution of our LinkedIn and Instagram presence. This is a ground-floor opportunity — you'll be one of the first people building this brand's content engine, with real potential to grow into a full-time role as the company scales.

This is not a "post and ghost" job. We need someone who thinks about content strategically, takes pride in design quality, and understands how to attract a professional B2B audience.

What You'll Be Doing



Creating and scheduling LinkedIn posts using Canva and Buffer (3–5x per week)

Writing captions and content that speaks to business owners, sales leaders, and executives

Building out and growing our Instagram presence from the ground up

Managing our content calendar and keeping posts consistent week over week

Monitoring engagement and flagging comments or messages that need a response

Assisting with LinkedIn outreach sequencing support via Dripify (training provided)



What We're Looking For



3+ years managing social media for a professional services, coaching, or B2B brand

Strong Canva skills — you must be able to show a portfolio of work

Experience with Buffer or a similar scheduling tool

Excellent written English — captions and copy are a big part of this role

Self-directed and reliable — you hit deadlines without being chased

Familiarity with LinkedIn content strategy for personal brands or consultants

Instagram experience is a strong plus



Tools We Use

Canva for Teams · Buffer · Dripify · LinkedIn · Instagram

Hours & Pay



Part-time: 15–20 hours per week to start

Compensation: $350–$450/month depending on experience

Schedule: Flexible, with at least 4–6 hours of overlap with US Central Time (CST)

Full-time opportunity available as the company grows



To Apply

Send a short message (3–5 sentences) telling us about a social media account you've managed for a professional services or B2B brand. Include a link to your Canva portfolio or examples of posts you've created. Applications without portfolio examples will not be considered.

title: Virtual Assistant / Payroll Auditor

Previous experience with payroll and financial record review

title: Long and Short Form Video Editor
description:
Video Editor + Social Media Assistant - Please READ the job description before responding

(Music, Storytelling, Travel Content)

nts into engaging videos for social media.

TikTok

Helping brainstorm creative content ideas

Identifying strong hooks and storytelling 
nts in videos

Skills We Are Looking For:

Editing travel or adventure content

Story-driven video editing

A love of music (especially piano) is a plus.



Preferred Background (Not Required):

Some projects include inspirational and historical content. Applicants who are members of The Church of Jesus Christ of Latter-day Saints may find this work especially meaningful. However, this is not required, and all qualified applicants are welcome to apply.



Compensation



Starting pay: $3.00 per hour

There is potential for increased hours and compensation as you demonstrate strong performance and creative contribution.



Application Instructions (IMPORTANT)



Applicants who do not follow these instructions will not be considered.



1. Loom Video (Maximum 90 Seconds)



Create a Loom video (90 seconds or less) where you:

Share your screen

Show at least 2 examples of video or creative work you personally created

Briefly explain your role in each project

Show the editing timeline for at least one project



Somewhere in your Loom video, please mention the word “studio.”



2. Portfolio Links



Provide at least 3 links to videos or creative work that you personally created or edited and are proud of.



These may include:

Video edits

Social media content

Graphic design

Reels or YouTube Shorts



3. Social Media Experience



Please include:

A link to your personal social media account

Links to any accounts you have helped manage or create content for



4. Research Assignment



Before applying, please research AT LEAST ONE of the following projects. These are all companies and creators you will likely be working with in some way if you are selected for the job:

Jason Tonioli

Glenn Rawson

Successful Musicians Podcast

Amazing Vacations USA



This role may involve working on or collaborating with all of these projects, so this step helps both of us determine if this would be a good fit.



After reviewing them, please provide:



Two ideas for content that could improve the
 or Instagram presence for ONE of these projects.

You do not need ideas for all of them — just choose the project that interests you most.



Explain:

What the content would be

Why it would perform well

Why you would be a good person to help create this content



Final Step

When submitting your application, please use the following format in the subject line:



OVER DELIVER | Your Name | Loom Link



Example:



OVER DELIVER | Maria Santos | loom link



Applications that do not follow this format may not be reviewed.



We look forward to seeing your work and learning more about your creative abilities.

title: Full-Time Video Editor for a Supplement Brand
description:
About Us

We are a fast-growing health and wellness brand obsessed with customer psychology and creative excellence. We don't just "make content," we build high-performance assets that drive millions in revenue. We are looking for a Video Editor who is genuinely passionate about performance, speed, and continuous improvement.



This is not a role for someone who just wants to follow a storyboard and clock out. We need a creative who looks at a hook and immediately thinks of three ways to make it more engaging, faster, and higher-converting.



Our philosophy: we prioritize 10 ads at 80% quality over 2 ads at 100%. Speed and volume win in performance marketing. If you're someone who obsesses over pixel-perfect polish at the expense of output, this isn't the right fit.



The Role

You will own the creation of high-volume, high-performance video ads, targeting 10–20 videos per week depending on length. This includes short-form for Meta/TikTok, long-form VSLs, AI avatars, B-roll edits, and voiceover-driven content.



You'll work from creative briefs and scripts provided by our creative strategists and copywriters, turning direction into polished, high-converting assets at speed. You take deep pride in ownership, turn raw footage and AI outputs into systematic creative machines, and ensure our creative output is a competitive advantage.



If you are a builder who thrives on iterating based on data rather than just "vibes," we want to talk to you.



What You Will Do

* Full-Spectrum Production: Create high-converting short-form ads (15–60s), UGC-style content, and long-form VSLs for Meta, TikTok, and YouTube.

* AI Mastery: Take full ownership of our AI tech stack, including Veo 3, HeyGen, Runway, and ElevenLabs for video, and Nano-Banana for statics, to produce high-quality AI video, avatar, and voiceover outputs at scale.

* Source Fresh Creatives: Proactively find and source fresh B-roll and visual assets from across the internet. You never run dry, and you never recycle.



What We're Looking For

Experience & Skills

* 2+ years of video editing experience, with specific experience editing for DTC brands or performance marketing.

* Technical mastery: Fluency in Premiere, Final Cut, or CapCut, plus advanced proficiency in AI video tools (Veo 3, HeyGen, Runway, ElevenLabs, Nano-Banana).

* Strategic thinking: Strong instincts for hooks, pacing, and storytelling in a Direct Response (DR) context.

* Resourcefulness: Proven ability to source fresh creatives, B-roll, and visual assets independently. You always have new material to work with.



Work Style

* Speed over perfection. You can move fast and deliver high volume without sacrificing the quality that matters.

* Implement feedback quickly, often same-day turnaround.

* Improvement-driven: You can demonstrate how you've personally improved a creative's performance through iteration or better editing workflows.

* Excellent English, clear written and verbal communication for seamless collaboration.

* Self-learner. You figure things out on your own. Whether it's a new tool, a new technique, or a new platform, you don't wait to be taught.

* Organized file structures and version control for rapid iteration.



Commitment

Full-time and exclusive. This role requires your full professional focus. We invest heavily in our people, training, tools, growth, and we're looking for someone who's equally invested in building something long-term with us.



Click here to apply : 
/jobs/
video-editor-dtc-ecommerce

s to travel partners

title: Podcast Video Editor (Premiere Pro) – Long Form + Social Clips
description:
We are looking for a reliable video editor to join our growing podcast production company.



We produce podcasts, interviews, and social media clips for multiple clients and need an editor who is comfortable working in Adobe Premiere Pro and delivering clean, professional edits.



This role focuses mainly on long-form podcast editing, with occasional short-form clips.



This is a remote role with consistent weekly work.



Responsibilities



Edit long-form podcast episodes (30–60 minutes)



Typical edits include:

• removing dead space

• tightening pacing

• cleaning up mistakes or stumbles

• syncing audio/video

• basic color correction

• basic audio balancing



You may also occasionally:



• create vertical clips from podcasts

• export social media clips

• organize project files



Requirements



You must:



• use Adobe Premiere Pro

• be able to send Premiere project files

• have strong English comprehension

• follow instructions closely

• communicate clearly if something is unclear

• meet deadlines consistently



Important



This job requires someone who does not cut out too much of the conversation. The goal is to tighten pacing while keeping the natural flow of the discussion.



If you are someone who removes large sections of conversations, this job is not a good fit.



Deliverables



For each project you will deliver:



• final video export

• Premiere project file

• all linked assets



Pay



Starting pay:







Consistent weekly work available.



Strong editors may be offered long-term contracts and increased hours.



To Apply



Please include:



Portfolio of podcast or interview edits



A short message answering this question:



When editing a podcast, how do you d
 what parts of the conversation to cut?



Include the word SPOTLIGHT at the top of your application so I know you read the full post.
