title: Construction Estimator (Concrete & Foundations Specialist)
description:
We are seeking a full-time, dedicated Construction Estimator (Concrete & Foundations Specialist) to support a growing construction and development company. This role focuses on performing detailed takeoffs, managing bid invitations, and preparing accurate cost estimates for concrete, foundation, remodeling, and commercial construction projects.



You will act as a key part of the estimation process, helping the team process a high volume of bid opportunities, ensure accurate job costing, and prepare complete proposals for submission.



This role is ideal for someone with hands-on concrete estimating experience, strong attention to detail, and the ability to work efficiently in a fast-paced environment.



Key Responsibilities



Perform detailed quantity takeoffs for concrete, foundation, remodeling, and commercial projects

Manage and review bid invitations received via BuildingConnected

Upload project plans and documents into the JobTread project management system

Send plans to suppliers to obtain material quotes (such as rebar quantities)

Calculate volumes, labor hours, and equipment requirements to determine project costs

Develop the scope of work and proposals for submission

Submit final bids through JobTread

Assist with project scheduling by estimating project duration based on takeoffs

Review project budgets and identify whether overruns are due to estimation or scheduling issues

Maintain high accuracy and ownership of all estimation work



Requirements

Required: Proven experience in Construction Estimating (Concrete / Division 3)



Strong understanding of:

Concrete construction and foundation systems

Reading and interpreting construction drawings and specifications

Performing quantity takeoffs and cost calculations

Labor, equipment, and material estimation

Construction scope interpretation



Additional Requirements:



Proficiency in PlanSwift (required)

Experience with JobTread or similar platforms (Buildertrend, etc.)

Strong written and verbal English communication skills

Highly detail-oriented with strong analytical skills

Ability to work independently and manage multiple deadlines

Must be reliable and looking for long-term stability



Tools & Platforms 



PlanSwift (required)

JobTread (required)

BuildingConnected (required)

Stack (a plus)

AI-assisted estimation tools (a plus)



WhatsApp or similar communication platforms



Work Schedule



Full-Time, 40 hours per week

Monday to Friday

8:00 AM – 5:00 PM (Central Time)

Remote position.



Important Note



This role requires concrete construction estimating experience.

Candidates with only general construction experience and no concrete estimating background may not be considered.



How to Apply



1. Complete this form:


/english



A 1–2 minute video introduction is required.



After submitting, reply with:

“application form done”



Please answer the following questions in your reply:



2. Do you have experience with construction estimating for concrete or foundations? How many years? Please describe your experience.

3. How confident are you with Division 3 concrete estimation? Please rate yourself (1–10) and explain.

4. Do you have experience with PlanSwift? If yes, how many years and how do you use it?

5. What other tools have you used for construction takeoffs and estimation?

6. Describe your experience managing bid invitations or preparing proposals.

7. Are you comfortable handling multiple bids and takeoffs with minimal supervision?

8.  Are you comfortable using a time-tracking tool?



Subject Line:

Construction Estimator – Your Name



Goodluck!

title: Quality Control Specialist - Real Estate Media
description:
ABOUT THE ROLE



We’re looking for a detail-obsessed Quality Control Specialist to join our team and help us deliver top-notch real estate media to our clients. In this role, you'll review photos, videos, and virtual media before they go out the door — making sure everything looks polished, professional, and exactly how the client expects it. You'll collaborate closely with our editing team, catch anything that’s “off,” flag necessary changes, and help us maintain a reputation for stunning, consistent work. You’ll also support light client communication when needed — helping make sure small edit requests or updates are handled quickly and professionally. If you have a keen eye for detail, love great visuals, and thrive in a fast-paced environment, you’ll fit right in.



WHAT YOU'LL BE DOING



Media Quality Assurance:

- Review completed photo and video projects using our editing platforms and project management systems.

- Check photos, drone photos, virtual twilight images, and videos for anything that needs fixing.

- Cross-reference client requests with project notes to ensure custom edits are completed properly.



Identify common visual issues like:

- Missing light bulbs, power lines, trash cans, stickers on appliances, etc.

- Light flares, reflections, blurry images, crooked lines, poor HDR quality, color issues.

- Typos in agent branding, missing or wrong logos, shaky video clips, bad audio.

- Ensure outdoor shots look natural — especially when sky replacements or virtual edits are involved.

- Submit clear, detailed edit requests to the editing team with screenshots and notes when needed.

- Double-check edits after corrections are made to ensure everything is finalized correctly.



Light Client Support:

- Assist with light customer service duties, including responding to client
s or texts about editing needs.

- Help coordinate small edit requests and corrections to ensure client satisfaction.

- Maintain professional and timely communication with clients when troubleshooting small issues.



Collaboration & Communication:

- Work directly with the editing team to flag major issues or minor fixes.

- Offer clear, constructive feedback and keep everything moving efficiently.

- Stay in close contact with the operations team and project managers to meet delivery timelines.



Process Improvement:

- Keep notes on common errors or recurring issues to help improve our internal processes.

- Stay up to date on new editing techniques, tools, and industry best practices.

- Help update the QC process regularly based on new learnings or client feedback.



What You’ll Need:

- 1+ years of experience in quality control, media production, editing, or real estate marketing preferred.

- A strong eye for detail — you notice the small things others miss!

- Basic understanding of photography and videography (composition, lighting, editing basics).

- Familiarity with photo editing platforms (Dropbox, Lightroom, Photoshop, etc.).

title: Client Success Manager - Real Estate Media
description:
ROLE SUMMARY

We are seeking a personable, high-energy, detail-oriented Client Success Manager to join our team. This dynamic hybrid role will require a blend of client communication & operational oversight to ensure the smooth functioning of their fast-growing real estate media business. The ideal candidate will excel in written & verbal communication, internal project management, and client relations, with a keen eye for detail and a passion for helping a business run smoothly. 



ROLE & RESPONSIBILITIES

- Manage all client communications via
, text, and phone while ensuring responsiveness.

- Make daily customer care calls in order to check in with and ensure clients’ satisfaction.

- Schedule photo/video shoots and manage calendars across multiple markets.

- Assist clients with service questions and light technical support, as necessary. 

- Implement quality control measures to ensure product and service excellence.

- Collaborate across teams to align on client projects and operational goals.

- Provide insights and consultations on service upgrades and packages to enhance client value.

- Maintain the organization’s CRM to ensure the accuracy of client data, while offering suggestions for improvement. 

- Contribute to a positive team culture through engagement, professional development, and retention initiatives.



SKILLS & QUALIFICATIONS

- You have 1-2 years of experience in an operations and/or administrative role within fast-paced service industries.

- You are proficient in utilizing and maintaining CRM tools & project management software.

- You are professional and showcase etiquette, a positive attitude, and excellent customer service skills.

- You are great with clients and understand the importance of relationship building.

- You are analytical and possess strong creative, problem-solving, critical-thinking, and decision-making skills.

- You can function under pressure in a fast-paced environment.

- You are detail obsessive and understand the importance of attention to detail.

- You take feedback well and constantly look for ways to improve your craft and the craft of the team at large.



BONUS POINTS

- Real estate industry, marketing/sales, and/or client management experience.

- Familiarity with media/real estate media equipment and photo shoots.

title: Administrative & Customer Support Assistant
description:
ROLE OVERVIEW

This role is ideal for a detail-oriented, tech-capable admin professional who thrives in structured work, enjoys keeping businesses organized, and can confidently support invoicing and customer follow-up processes. They will need strong operational instincts, comfort with invoicing systems, and the ability to learn new tools quickly.



KEY RESPONSIBILITIES



Invoicing & Accounts Support:

- Input invoices into Sage (or similar accounting system)

- Process, monitor, and track incoming cash receipts

- Follow up on late payments and overdue invoices

- Email invoices to customers daily or weekly based on schedule

- Maintain clean records of billing and payment status



Client Communication & Quote Follow-Up

- Support customer service via email communication

- Follow up with clients on outstanding quotes and pending approvals

- Ensure no client requests or proposals fall through the cracks

- Help the team stay responsive while protecting their time



Administrative Organization

- Organize inbox workflows and manage calendar scheduling

- Assist with appointment coordination, reminders, and task tracking

- Build repeatable systems for day-to-day admin operations



Systems & Tech Support (Critical Need)

- Assist in evaluating and selecting a new Operating System/software platform

- Help port administrative processes into updated tools

- Improve internal workflows through automation, templates, and structure

- Comfortable working across Google Workspace, CRMs, invoicing tools, and new platforms



IDEAL CANDIDATE PROFILE

- Extremely organized and detail-oriented

- Confident handling invoicing, billing support, and client follow-up

- Tech-savvy and comfortable learning new systems quickly

- Proactive — doesn’t wait to be told what’s broken

- Strong written communicator with a professional customer-facing tone

- Experienced supporting small business owners or operations teams



PREFERRED EXPERIENCE

- Admin support, customer support, or operations assistance

- Familiarity with invoicing/accounting tools (Sage is a plus)

- Experience helping companies implement new software or workflows

- VA experience supporting U.S.-based service businesses



SUCCESS IN THIS ROLE LOOKS LIKE

- Invoices go out consistently and on time

- Late payments are tracked and followed up systematically

- Client quote follow-up becomes reliable and automated

- Calendar, inbox, and admin workload feel under control

- The organization transitions smoothly into stronger systems and operating structure



HOURS & COMPENSATION

- Starting at 10~20 hours/week

- Opportunity to expand into a long-term operations support role

- Competitive compensation based on experience and technical skill

1?? Your experience responding to

title: Head of Procurement
description:
SBFM are looking for an experienced Head of Procurement to join our business. You will be responsible for owning executing the procurement strategy, ensuring cost efficiency, supplier performance, and compliance with regulatory standards. 

This role will involve overseeing the procurement of goods and services, managing supplier relationships, and ensuring tight cost control to support our business objectives. 



Duties And Responsibilities 



• Own and implement procurement strategies that drive cost savings and operational efficiency. 

• Manage supplier selection, negotiation, and contract management to drive quality and cost-effectiveness.

• Keep procurement policies and procedures up to date, ensuring compliance with company and regulatory standards, with a focus on ESG.

• Conduct market analysis to identify trends, risks, and opportunities within the supply chain. 

• Work closely with internal stakeholders to understand business needs and ensure procurement aligns with company objectives. 

• Drive sustainability and ethical sourcing initiatives within procurement processes. 



Qualifications And Skills 



• Proven experience in procurement, preferably in the Facilities Management industry.

• In-depth understanding of supply chain management principles. 

• Experience managing supplier relationships and performance metrics.

• Degree in Procurement and Supply Chain Management and/or CIPS (Chartered Institute of Procurement & Supply) qualification is highly desirable.

• Strong negotiation and contract management skills. 

• Strong financial acumen with experience in budgeting and cost control. 

• Excellent leadership and stakeholder management skills.



Please note that this role will operate on UK office hours between 9am and 5pm, Monday to Friday.



If you feel that you have the skills and experience to fulfil this role, please send your CV and covering letter via the platform and a member of our onboarding team will be in contact once this has been reviewed.

title: AI Outbound Automation Specialist - Cold Email + LinkedIn | US Fintech | Project-to-FT
description:
You will work directly with the CEO of a US-based fintech startup building software for regulated financial firms. This is not a managed role - you report directly to the founder, you own your pipeline, and your results are visible.



This starts as a short-term paid project. If results are strong, it converts to a full-time position with a base salary and a meaningful equity stake from a large stock option pool.



We are looking for someone who runs outbound the way an engineer approaches systems: build it, automate it, test it, improve it — and use AI at every step.



WHO YOU ARE

You've built outbound campaigns from zero, not just managed someone else's. You know what a good sequence looks like, why it works, and how to fix it when it doesn't.



You use AI natively. Not as a novelty — as your primary tool for writing, research, workflow logic, and iteration. When you're given a new task, your first instinct is to figure out how to automate it and how Claude or another model can do the heavy lifting.



You are comfortable connecting APIs and building automations without engineering support. You think in workflows.



You write direct response copy that sounds like a human — even when it's personalized at scale.



You don't need to be told what to test next. You already have a list.



WHAT YOU OWN

Outbound infrastructure

Build and run multi-channel outbound sequences using HeyReach (LinkedIn) and Smartlead or Instantly (cold
). You own setup, deliverability, sequencing logic, and ongoing optimization.



Contact list building and management

Scrape, enrich, and segment prospect lists using BrightData API, Decodo, Sales Navigator etc.. You know how to build a targeted list from scratch and keep it clean.



Browser automation

Use Playwright + n8n to automate repetitive outbound research and data extraction tasks. You are comfortable writing or adapting automation scripts with AI assistance.



AI-assisted workflows

Use Claude and Claude Code to centralize campaign management, build internal reporting, automate copy iteration, and reduce manual work across the stack. If you've built n8n workflows where Claude is doing the thinking — that's exactly what we're looking for.



Direct response copywriting

Write sequences that get replies. You understand hook frameworks, subject line testing, personalization triggers, and follow-up logic. You use AI to generate, test, and iterate — but you know the difference between a message that converts and one that reads like it was written by a robot.



A/B testing and analysis

Run structured tests. Document what wins. Build from evidence, not gut feel.



Retargeting and re-engagement

Build follow-up workflows for opens-without-replies, stalled conversations, and cold leads worth reactivating.



CRM hygiene

Log every meaningful interaction within 48 hours. We use GHL (GoHighLevel). Clean data is non-negotiable.





YOUR TWO PIPELINE TRACKS

Track 1 — Customer demos

Book qualified live meetings with decision-makers at financial services firms: CFOs, Controllers, Heads of FP&A. A qualified demo means the right buyer profile, a near-term need, and a confirmed path to a decision. You will be trained on our ICP and messaging — no prior fintech experience required.



Track 2 — Strategic outreach

Book meetings with institutional contacts and strategic partners in the US financial ecosystem. Target lists and outreach strategy are provided by the CEO. You execute and optimize.





WEEKLY SUCCESS METRICS

Two numbers. That's it.

— Qualified customer demos booked and held

— Strategic partner meetings booked and held



Targets are set together at onboarding based on list size and sequence performance.



TECH STACK

HeyReach | Smartlead | BrightData API / Decodo | Playwright | n8n | Sales Navigator | GHL (GoHighLevel) | Claude Code | Baserow | Clickup



You don't need to know every tool. Tell us which ones you know and how fast you learn the rest.



WHAT WE ARE NOT LOOKING FOR

- Someone who has "used AI" but never shipped an automated workflow.

- Someone who can run sequences but can't build them.

- Someone who needs their copy edited before it goes out.

- Someone running this as one of ten simultaneous jobs.





COMPENSATION AND STRUCTURE

- $6.00/hour USD — paid reliably, on time

- Begins as a short-term project engagement (scope and timeline discussed at offer)

- Converts to full-time with base salary for strong performers

- Large stock option pool — meaningful equity available for the right person

- 100% remote





HOW TO APPLY



Start your cover letter with SYSTEM BUILDER at the very top. Applications without this are not reviewed.



Then answer this one question in 3–5 sentences:



Describe a workflow you built using AI. What does it do, what tools did you connect, and what does it save you or your team?



If you haven't built one yet, tell us what you would build for this role and how you'd approach it. We're testing how you think, not just what you've done.

title: Design & Marketing Assistant
description:
Kopa Creative is an Australian boutique copywriting and digital brand agency seeking a skilled Virtual Design & Marketing Assistant to join our team.

On a mission to make professional brand support accessible to all, we’re passionate about helping small and mid-sized businesses find their voice, stand out with clarity and connect genuinely with their audience.

Through collaborative website design, SEO copywriting, social and strategic brand guidance, we help businesses show up confidently and consistently, translating their vision into words and a presence that truly resonates.

We’re looking for someone with a strong creative eye and confident design skills who can take ownership of visual output across web, digital and print. If you’re excited to grow alongside us and contribute to meaningful work that makes a real difference, we’d love to hear from you.



ABOUT THE ROLE

This role blends general virtual assistant support with hands-on design and web development work. You’ll be responsible for creating visually polished, brand-consistent assets across a range of platforms, from websites and
 templates to social media graphics and professional documents.

Above all, we’re looking for someone who brings creative initiative and independent judgement to their work. You should be the kind of person who doesn’t just follow a brief, but thinks critically about what will look good, work well and communicate effectively, then acts on that with confidence.



**A good eye for branded design and a solid working knowledge of website design, are the most important qualities for this role.**



ROLE TASKS - PRIMARY 

This role will include the following:



Web Design & Page Building

• Build, customise and maintain web pages, landing pages and
 templates primarily in Wix Studio (not Classic), with additional work in Shopify and Squarespace as needed.

• Work to provided briefs and brand guidelines, while using your own creative judgement to make layout and design decisions that look professional, are brand-aligned and feel intuitive.

• Ensure all web content is visually consistent, mobile-responsive and user-friendly.



Graphic Design & Branded Assets

• Design branded visual assets such as social media posts, flyers, banners and marketing materials using Canva and/or Adobe Illustrator.

• Maintain brand consistency across all visual content, applying colour palettes, fonts and design elements accurately.

• Bring creative ideas to the table – proactively suggest designs, layouts or concepts that align with each brand’s identity.



Social Media Content Design

• Design professional, branded content for
, Instagram and LinkedIn, for Kopa Creative and their range of clients



Document Design & Formatting

• Create professionally formatted, brand-aligned documents and document templates in Microsoft Word, PowerPoint and Excel (e.g. proposals, reports, content calendars, guides, presentations and spreadsheets).

• Apply consistent formatting, layout and visual structure to ensure all documents are polished and ready for client delivery.



Automation & Workflow Management

• Set up and manage automated
 sequences and client follow-ups to streamline communication and maintain consistency.



ROLE TASKS - SECONDARY

Depending on your skills and experience, this role may also include the following:



Social Media Management

• Schedule and post content across
, Instagram and LinkedIn using platforms like Meta Business Suite.

• Engage with followers and respond to comments in a way that reflects our, and our clients’, brand voice and values.



Analytics & Insights

• Track social media performance and competitor activity, delivering clear reports that highlight actionable insights and emerging trends.



Systems & Processes

• Build and maintain operational frameworks, including routine processes, policies and workflows that support consistent delivery, scalable growth and improved efficiency across client projects and internal operations.



Administrative Support

• Monitor
s, manage calendars (including scheduling client calls, meetings and time blocking), and help prioritise weekly tasks and deadlines.



POSITION DETAILS

• Hours: Part-time, starting at 5–10 hours per week, with potential to grow as the business evolves.

• Working Hours: Flexible, between 9am–11pm ACST (Australian Central Standard Time), Monday to Friday.

• Pay Rate: Compensation offered will reflect your experience and the skills you bring to the role, with increased earning opportunities based on performance.



NON-NEGOTIABLE SKILLS

We work in an industry where visual quality, accuracy and consistency are crucial. The following skills are essential for this role:



Design & Web (Core Focus)

• A strong eye for design – you instinctively know what looks good, what works well and how to create visuals that feel professional and on-brand.

• High level of proficiency in building and customising desktop and mobile optimised web pages and
 templates in Wix Studio (primary), with working knowledge of Shopify and Squarespace. Note: Wordpress design and template building knowledge would be a real bonus.

• High level of proficiency in Canva and/or Adobe Illustrator for creating branded graphic assets (social posts, flyers, banners, marketing collateral).

• High level of proficiency in creating professionally designed and formatted documents in Microsoft Word, PowerPoint and Excel.

• Creative initiative and independent judgement – you can take a brief and run with it, making confident design decisions without needing step-by-step direction.

• An intuitive understanding of layout, spacing, colour and typography and how these elements work together to communicate a brand effectively.



General Skills

• Strong written English and comprehension skills, with an emphasis on clear and effective communication.

• Exceptional attention to detail in all tasks, from design work to administration and client delivery.

• Ability to follow direction precisely and work to deadlines, while also taking initiative and thinking proactively.

• Ability to write with emotional intelligence, communicating a brand’s tone and voice effectively and connecting authentically through text.

• Active listening skills to truly understand client needs and feedback.

• Commitment to personal and professional growth – both yours and ours – with a genuine interest in the work we do.

• Availability to be online within the specified hours.



ELIGIBILITY

To be eligible, you will need access to:

• A reliable computer

• Wix, Shopify and/or Squarespace (web design platforms)

• Canva and/or Adobe Illustrator (graphic design tools)

• Microsoft Word, PowerPoint and Excel

• Access to
 and social media platforms 
, Instagram, LinkedIn)

• WhatsApp or Messenger applications for team communication

• Zoom or Google Meet for meetings and training sessions

• A fast internet connection



ADDITIONAL INFORMATION

Training: All necessary training and upskilling will be provided. A paid probationary period of 30 days will be in effect to ensure a good fit for both parties.

Key Performance Indicators (KPIs): Performance goals will be set post-probationary period according to your experience and training, then reviewed regularly as workload and business priorities evolve.



QUALIFYING TASK

To be considered for this position, please respond to this Job Application with the following statement:



“This is (YOUR NAME). I would be thrilled to join your team and contribute to Kopa Creative. I would like to apply for the Virtual Design & Marketing Assistant position. Today is (THE DAY and MONTH YOU SEND THE
, eg. May 26). Thank you.”



Additionally, please complete this form to finalise your application (please note: you may need a Google Account to sign in):






Failure to complete the form will result in the exclusion of your application.

title: Sales Manager
description:
Sales Manager (Remote – Philippines)



Company: Buzz Digital Agency



Remote Work Requirements (Non-Negotiable)

Please review carefully before applying.

This is a full-time, remote position requiring:

- Work Hours: Availability from 9 AM – 6 PM US CST, Monday through Friday.

- Reliable Technology: Stable high-speed internet connection and a functional computer/laptop.

- Hubstaff Usage: You will be required to use Hubstaff for time tracking, productivity monitoring, and reporting.

- Video Meetings: Cameras must be on during all team and client video meetings.

- Full-Time Focus: This is a full-time role; no side jobs or multiple employments are allowed.



About Us

Buzz Digital Agency is a dynamic, results-driven digital marketing company focused on delivering innovative and impactful solutions. We specialize in helping businesses grow through SEO, PPC, social media, and digital strategy.

We’re seeking an experienced and motivated Sales Manager to lead our growing sales team and drive business growth. If you have a passion for sales, leadership, and digital marketing—and thrive in a fast-paced, performance-driven environment—this opportunity is for you.



Role Overview

As our Sales Manager, you’ll lead and inspire a small but ambitious sales team, strategize to expand our client base, and ensure we exceed revenue goals. You’ll work directly with the Managing Partner and collaborate with marketing and operations to ensure seamless execution and client satisfaction.



Key Responsibilities

- Lead & Motivate: Mentor the sales team to achieve individual and team goals, providing training and performance feedback.

- Sales Strategy & Execution: Develop and execute sales strategies to acquire new business, expand existing accounts, and drive revenue growth.

- Client Relationship Management: Build and maintain strong relationships with key decision-makers, deliver tailored digital solutions, and ensure client satisfaction.

- CRM & Pipeline Management: Oversee the sales pipeline, ensuring leads are tracked and followed through in the CRM (GoHighLevel.).

- Collaboration: Work closely with marketing to align lead generation campaigns with sales efforts and optimize conversion.

- Performance Metrics & Reporting: Track key sales metrics, generate performance reports, and recommend improvements to leadership.

- Process Optimization: Continuously refine sales processes and workflows for better efficiency and conversion.



Required Qualifications & Skills

- 3–5 years of proven B2B sales experience (preferably in digital marketing, SaaS, or advertising services).

- Demonstrated leadership or team management experience.

- Excellent English communication and presentation skills.

- Strong understanding of digital marketing services (SEO, PPC, social media, etc.).

- Proficient with CRM systems and Hubstaff (or similar time-tracking tools).

- High level of accountability, organization, and self-motivation in a remote setup.



Why Join Buzz Digital Agency?

- Work directly with senior leadership and make a measurable impact on company growth.

- Be part of a creative, results-oriented, and collaborative remote team.

- Uncapped earning potential through commissions and bonuses.

- Long-term career growth opportunities in a rapidly expanding digital agency.





To apply, please fill out this application form:

title: Graphic Designer (Elementor + Wordpress)

What You’ll Do

 marketing designs and landing pages in drag-and-drop tools like Klaviyo or Unbounce

title: Experienced Project Manager (Amazon FBA | Full-Time)
description:
Join a Fast-Growing E-Commerce Brand Based in Singapore



We’re a fast-growing Singapore-based Amazon FBA brand, and we’re looking for a strong Amazon Project Manager to help us scale.



This is not a coordinator role.

You’ll be managing people, systems, and execution across our Amazon operations.



We’re looking for someone who already knows the Amazon backend and can operate independently without being hand-held.



What you’ll be doing



You’ll manage a team of around 6 people across listings, design, and operations.



You’ll coordinate shipping plans with suppliers, freight forwarders, and inspection agents.

You’ll review and improve product listings, making sure keywords, images, and backend data are correct.

You’ll track inventory, sales, and campaigns, and keep our spreadsheets and dashboards accurate.

You’ll work closely with our design, listing, and ops teams to keep launches and updates on track.



You’ll take part in internal training, including AI-powered workflows.

AI is a tool, not a crutch. We expect you to use it to think better, work faster, and improve outcomes, not to blindly paste output.



You’ll help plan projects, improve processes, and make sure details like product size tiers and listing data are correct before they cost us money.



Tools you’ll use



Amazon Seller Central

Google Sheets and Docs

Notion

Helium 10

DataDive

Zoom



What we’re looking for



At least 5 years of relevant experience, ideally in Amazon FBA or e-commerce operations.

Real experience with Amazon listings, inventory tracking, and backend workflows.

Strong attention to detail and the ability to communicate clearly with different teams.

Able to work independently, prioritise well, and adapt when things change.

Strong problem-solving, coordination, and analytical skills.

Proactive, open-minded, and able to work well in a fast-moving team.



Working hours



Monday to Friday, 12 PM to 10 PM Singapore time

1 hour break

Remote, 44 hours per week



How to apply



Please include:



A short introduction about yourself and why you’re a good fit

Links or references to past Amazon FBA work

A brief explanation of your most recent role

A short video introduction if possible

Clear details of your Amazon FBA experience



Important



Only candidates with real Amazon FBA experience will be considered.

Applications without references or relevant background will be ignored.

If you are new to Amazon or need training, this is not the right role for you.

title: Marketing & Lead Generation Executive Assistant
description:
(Long-Term | Growth Path to Full-Time)



I am a coach and founder building a fast-growing coaching business with a long-term vision. I am looking for someone who wants to grow with the business, not just work inside it.



This role begins part-time, with a clear path to full-time (40 hours per week) as coaching clients sign up and the business grows. The right person will see their hours, responsibility, and stability increase as results increase.



I do not micromanage or give step-by-step instructions. I expect someone who is proactive, resourceful, and genuinely cares about helping the business grow.



What This Role Is Really About



Your primary responsibility is to help turn existing content, platforms, and systems into more booked coaching calls and signed coaching clients.



As results increase, so will your role.



Everything you work on should support this outcome.



Key Responsibilities



Marketing & Content Support

• Study my existing content across YouTube, LinkedIn, Instagram,
, and TikTok

• Improve how content is organized, repurposed, and scheduled

• Support consistent newsletter creation and scheduling

• Look for ways to make content clearer and more effective



Lead Generation & Scheduling

• Help move interested prospects toward booking coaching calls

• Manage scheduling, follow-ups, and confirmations

• Ensure qualified leads are not missed



Organization & Systems

• Keep calendars, tasks, and priorities organized

• Prepare work and schedules in advance

• Document what works so execution improves over time



Proactive Partnership

• Think ahead and take initiative

• Bring ideas and improvements

• Communicate clearly and reliably



Growth Path



• Start: Part-time (15–20 hours per week)

• Growth: Increased hours as results improve

• Goal: Full-time (40 hours per week) as coaching clients sign up



This role is ideal for someone who wants stability and growth tied directly to the success of the business.



This Role Is NOT a Fit If:



• You only want short-term or freelance work

• You need constant direction

• You prefer limited responsibility

• You are not interested in growing into a full-time role

You make excuses when weather or health things come up



This Role IS a Great Fit If:



• You care about doing excellent work

• You want to grow into a full-time role

• You enjoy ownership and responsibility

• You like helping a business grow

• You want long-term stability



Important Expectations



• Strong English comprehension and communication

• High ownership and follow-through

• Ability to work independently

• Long-term mindset



To Apply (Required)



Please answer all questions clearly:



Why are you interested in growing from part-time into a full-time role?



How do you approach improving systems or content when little direction is given?



Describe a time you worked hard to help a business grow.



How do you make sure nothing important falls through the cracks?



What does working like a long-term partner mean to you?



Applications that do not answer all questions will not be reviewed.



Final Note



This role is for someone who wants to build something meaningful over time, take pride in results, and grow alongside a business that is expanding quickly.

title: Product Support Specialist (Fresh Graduate)
description:
I’M LOOKING FOR A RECENT GRADUATE OF A COMPUTER SCIENCE OR RELATED PROGRAM WHO IS PROFICIENT IN JAVASCRIPT.

This position is a great fit for someone who enjoys helping others, solving problems, and gaining a deeper understanding of how software works.

What You’ll Be Doing

title: Senior Direct Response Funnel Builder (Shopify + Funnelish + Advertorial Funnels)
description:
We are looking for a serious and experienced funnel builder who can take full ownership of building high-converting eCommerce funnels.



This is not a simple page builder job.



We build advertorial funnels for health and consumer products using Shopify and Funnelish, and we need someone who understands direct response conversion funnels.



The goal is simple:



Build funnels that convert and can scale with paid traffic.



Your Responsibilities



You will be responsible for building and improving funnels from start to finish.



This includes:



• Building advertorial pages

• Creating high-converting Shopify product pages

• Connecting Shopify products and bundles

• Creating Funnelish flows

• Implementing upsells and downsells

• Connecting checkout links correctly

• Setting up bundle offers (1 / 2 / 3 / 5 pieces)

• Setting up Shopify variants and pricing logic

• Testing the entire funnel flow across devices

• Fixing technical issues quickly

• Improving funnel structure to increase conversion



You will often work from existing competitor funnels that need to be rebuilt and optimized.



Speed, accuracy and attention to detail are important.



Shopify Product Page Experience



You must also be comfortable building Shopify product pages designed for paid traffic funnels.



This includes:



• Structuring high-converting product pages

• Implementing bundle offers and variant pricing

• Setting compare-at prices correctly

• Adding trust elements (reviews, guarantees, FAQs)

• Optimizing layout for mobile conversion

• Connecting Shopify products correctly with Funnelish flows



This is not a standard Shopify store setup.



Our product pages are built specifically for conversion from paid traffic.



Important



This role focuses on direct response funnels, not traditional website development.



If your experience is mainly building corporate websites or design-focused landing pages, this role is not the right fit.



We are looking for someone who understands:



• conversion psychology

• advertorial funnels

• paid traffic funnels

• eCommerce bundles and checkout flows



How We Work



We move fast and build many funnels.



We are looking for someone who:



• communicates clearly

• works quickly and efficiently

• enjoys solving technical problems

• takes ownership of the funnel



If things go well, this can become a long-term position with consistent work.



Experience Required



You should have experience with some of the following:



• Shopify product setup and variants

• Funnelish funnels

• advertorial funnels

• direct response landing pages

• upsells and downsells

• bundle offers and pricing logic

• conversion rate optimization



Experience with health, supplement, or consumer product funnels is a strong advantage.



To Apply



Please answer the following:



1?? What funnels have you built before?

Please include links or screenshots.



2?? What platforms did you use?

Example: Shopify, Funnelish, ClickFunnels, Webflow, etc.



3?? What type of products were these funnels for?

Example: supplements, beauty, consumer products, etc.



4?? What was the funnel structure?

Example: Ad ? advertorial ? product page ? checkout ? upsell



5?? What was your role in building the funnel?



6?? Can you work daily if needed?



Applications without examples of previous work will not be reviewed.

title: Transportation Engineer
description:
Transportation Safety Engineer - Street Simplified

Full-time, Remote



At Street Simplified, we use video analytics to help public sector agencies understand why crashes happen and give them the tools to proactively prevent them. We are looking to hire a Transportation Safety Engineer who is passionate about road safety and saving lives.

Responsibilities and Duties:

Building detailed reports outlining risks and potential mitigations at high-crash locations

Research into new countermeasures, standards, and agency requirements

Review of Street Safety Analytics data, quality control, and analytics interpretation

Researching safety-related topics and writing articles or publications

Applying programming techniques to improve safety decision-making

Using transportation engineering concept formulation & preliminary design

Bachelors of civil, or traffic engineering, or a related field (compensation will vary based on expertise, experience, and education)

Preferred experience in transportation engineering & design

Preferred experience in transportation safety

Preferred experience with programming, statistical analysis, and research

title: Staff Accountant
description:
Must be available Eastern Standard Time during the work day.



Part Time with the opportunity to be Full Time after probationary period



We are a professional, agile, forward thinking, and innovative organization with the goal to help business owners get past their "ceiling" in a sustainable way to create lasting value. 



Are you looking for an adventure? Remote work? Part-time with the potential to go full-time? Flexible schedule? A growing company?



We're seeking candidates who are comfortable in a self-directed role and understand the responsibilities that come with this position. 



We're looking for driven, self-motivated individuals who are innovative and interested in expanding our company. Our ideal candidate enjoys working independently as well as with a team and is willing to take on a high level of responsibility.



Responsibilities:

• Complete understanding of the accounting equation.

• Responsible for multiple client activities.

• Maintaining financial reports, records, and general ledger accounts.

• Ability to manage multiple clients and projects.

• Preparing journal entries, analyses, and account reconciliations and driving monthly close processes.

• Contributing to the development and review of annual operating budgets and performance projections.

• Create process and procedure documentation for accounting activities specific to client operations.

• Performing monthly balance sheet reconciliations.

• Perform Trial Balance reconciliations.

• Perform Monthly reviews

• Understand Cash requirements. 

• Brainstorm and problem solve client issues with the internal and possibly external client teams.

• Maintain client KPI’s, reconcile or review financial statement preparation and other financial reporting.

• Respond to information requests, validate accounting transactions, procedure, and documentation to support internal and external requirements.

• Excellent internal and external communication skills.

• Coordinating information and data between client internal team and external finance team.

• Ensuring compliance with GAAP.



Must be available Eastern Standard Time during the work day.

title: Creative Graphic/Video VA for Long Term Position
description:
We’re looking for an exceptionally creative and skilled Graphic Design & Video Editing VA to join our team full-time (40 hours per week). If you're someone who keeps up with the latest design and Instagram video trends, has a strong aesthetic sense, and thrives on delivering cutting-edge visuals, this role is for you.



REQUIREMENTS

Excellent eye for design and detail

Strong Canva and CapCut skills (Photoshop a bonus)

Fast and reliable internet connection (minimum 10 Mbps)

Fast computer/laptop that can handle heavy editing and large files

Comfortable creating videos from scratch and following creative briefs

Willingness to learn and adapt content trends, especially on Instagram

Excellent English communication skills (spoken and written)

Availability to work 9AM-6PM Mountain Time (Training will be in CST hours: 9:00 AM – 6:00 PM)

Can work independently and meet tight deadlines

WHO WE’RE LOOKING FOR:

title: Operations Director (Finance & Operations) | $1,400/mo + 13th Month | 20 Days PTO
description:
We are hiring an Operations Director to run the business side of our civil rights and employment law firm.

• comfortable with numbers and financial tracking

• a strong communicator across teams

• proactive and solutions-focused (not someone who waits to be told what to do)



You will work directly with the Managing Director and serve as his right-hand partner in running the firm's day-to-day operations.



This is a long-term growth role with increasing responsibility and compensation as the firm expands.



WHAT YOU’LL DO



Finance (30%)

• Manage billing and invoicing through our practice management system

• Monitor AR and follow up on unpaid balances

• Run payroll and assist with financial administration

• Track budgets, revenue, and expenses

Operations (50%)

• Maintain internal systems, templates, and workflows

• Audit matters for compliance with firm procedures

• Manage scheduling coordination across the team

• Maintain contracts, renewals, and vendor relationships

• Handle administrative work such as data entry and system updates



Marketing Support (20%)

• Run client satisfaction surveys and feedback systems

• Track lead sources and marketing metrics

• Support marketing workflows and follow-ups



WHAT WE’RE LOOKING FOR



Must-Haves

• Excellent written and spoken English

• Strong attention to detail and organization

• Comfort working with numbers and systems

• Ability to work full-time 9 AM – 5 PM EST

• Reliable internet and professional workspace



Strongly Preferred



• Background in finance, accounting, or operations

• Experience with billing, bookkeeping, or reporting

• Experience supporting leadership teams

• Experience with CRMs or practice management systems



COMPENSATION & BENEFITS



• $1,400 USD Monthly Salary (Paid bi-weekly via Wise)

• 13th-Month Salary (Paid in December; prorated if mid-year)

• 20 Days Paid Leave per Year (15 personal + 5 sick)

HOW TO APPLY



Complete our application form here: 



Applications submitted via OnlineJobs.ph,
, or social media will not be considered.

title: We're Hiring: Facebook Ads Media Buyer
description:
Meta Ads Media Buyer — Marketing Agency | Remote | $1,500–$2,000/month



What We Do



We run Meta ads for outdoor living contractors (pergolas, pools, turf, pavers, outdoor kitchens) across the US. Our model is simple: we generate leads, our setters book appointments, contractors close deals. We charge per appointment. If the ads don't perform, clients leave. If they perform, clients stay and grow. The media buyer is the most important role in our company.



What You'll Own



You will manage 15–25 Meta ad accounts independently. That means:



Campaign strategy, setup, and optimization across all accounts. You d
 what to test, when to scale, when to kill. Nobody is going to tell you what buttons to press.



Creative direction: You write briefs for our video editor, review output, and d
 what runs. You don't need to edit video, but you need to know what converts.



Cost per lead and cost per appointment are your numbers. You own them. If CPL is high, you fix it. You don't wait for someone to tell you there's a problem.



Landing page and lead form optimization. You'll work inside GoHighLevel (GHL) to build and test funnels. If you haven't used GHL, that's fine. But you need to understand funnel logic.



Who This Is For



You've managed Meta campaigns for local service businesses. not ecom, not info products, not dropshipping. Local. You understand targeting, lead forms vs landing pages, and why cost per lead alone is a bad metric without conversion data behind it.



You can look at an ad account and within 10 minutes tell me what's wrong and what you'd test first. Not because you read it in a course. 



You don't need to be managed. You need to be pointed in a direction and left alone to produce results. If you need daily check ins and hand holding, this is not the role.



Who This Is NOT For

If you completed a Meta ads course and now call yourself a media buyer, don't apply!



If your experience is boosting posts for restaurants, don't apply!



If you need someone to review every decision before you make it, don't apply!



Compensation

$1,500–$2,000/month depending on experience. This is a full-time remote position. We're a small team that communicates on Slack. We don't do daily standups or unnecessary meetings. 



We do results.



How To Apply



Send your application with:



1. A 2-3 minute Loom video walking us through the last local service business account you managed on Meta. Show us the account if you can, or just talk through it: what was the niche, what was the monthly spend, what results did you get, and what would you have done differently. No scripts. No editing. Just talk. We want to see how you think and communicate.



2. Answer this question: An outdoor remodeling client is spending $100/day on Meta. Their CPL is $45 but their cost per booked appointment is $380. CTR is strong at 2.1%. What's your diagnosis and what do you test first?



3. If you make it past the first round, you'll receive a real screenshot from one of our accounts and 48 hours to submit a written audit, what's wrong, what you'd change, and why. This is how we hire. 





We care if you can think independently and deliver results. If that's you, apply. If you're not sure, it's probably not.

title: YouTube Video Editor (Comedy / Storytelling / Clips Specialist)
description:
About the Channel

I am launching a YouTube channel centered around:

nts (Madden & NCAA Football)

• Gaming clips

From that footage you will create:

• 1–2 YouTube long-form videos (10–15 minutes)

Editing Style Needed

Videos should feel:

• fast-paced and engaging

• comedic and personality-driven

• optimized for YouTube

Skills that help:

• 
 cuts and zooms

• captions and subtitles

• sound effects and visual punchlines

• pacing for audience retention



Tools You Might Use

You may use tools such as:

• CapCut

• Adobe Premiere Pro

• Final Cut Pro

Experience editing YouTube Shorts and TikTok clips is a big plus.



What Success Looks Like

A great editor will help transform one long recording into many pieces of content.

Example workflow:

One 60-minute recording could become:

• 1 YouTube video

• 2 mid-length clips

• 10 short clips

This role is perfect for someone who enjoys content mining and social media editing.

title: Operations Virtual Assistant
description:
Note: Interested applicants must submit their application exclusively through the OnlineJobs platform. Do not
 the company directly. Any candidate who contacts the company outside of the OnlineJobs system will be disqualified from consideration.



Operations Virtual Assistant

(Process-Driven | High-Precision | Behind-the-Scenes Operations)



Job Overview



Maid In America Cleaning Services is hiring an Operations Virtual Assistant to protect schedule integrity, data accuracy, and operational consistency.



This is a behind-the-scenes execution role. You will not be customer-facing. You will work inside defined systems and SOPs to ensure our operational engine runs cleanly and efficiently every day.



If you enjoy structured work, moving quickly without sacrificing accuracy, and taking pride in clean execution, this role will feel natural to you.



What You’ll Do:



1. Scheduling & Job Management (Primary Responsibility)

You will own scheduling preparation and system accuracy for our TN locations.



This includes:

- Creating and modifying clients, jobs, and visits in Jobber

- Preparing future-day schedules for review and approval

- Creating training tasks in Jobber for new tea
mbers

- Re-sequencing jobs and rebalancing teams within defined guardrails

- Maintaining week-to-week schedule consistency whenever possible

- Flagging and correcting conflicts or inefficiencies early

- Executing same-day scheduling adjustments exactly as directed



2. Data Accuracy & System Integrity

You will ensure operational data is accurate, complete, and reliable.



This includes:

- Updating customer notes, job frequencies, and service details

- Invoicing customers promptly after service completion

- Calculating cost-of-service data after jobs

- Preparing timesheet and tips reports for payroll

- Logging complaints and rectified cleans accurately

- Creating and publishing weekly operational reports

- Manual KPI data entry

3. Administrative Support

You will support operational structure and remove administrative friction.



This includes:

- Supporting the Assistant Operations Manager with administrative execution

- Following established documentation and checklists consistently



What This Role Requires

- High pace with high accuracy

- Comfort with structured, repeatable tasks

- Strong attention to detail

- Clear communication when issues arise

- Strong adherence defined systems and guardrails

- Ability to work independently within clear expectations



This role involves a high volume of operational tasks that must be completed correctly and consistently. As the company grows, volume will increase — and this role grows with it.



Who We’re Looking For



Detail-Oriented & Reliable

You take pride in doing things correctly and thoroughly.



High Throughput Executor

You can handle volume without losing structure or focus.



Process-Driven

Our Core Values

Important Screening Step (Read Carefully)



SERIOUS APPLICANTS ONLY:

title: Client Acquisition & Marketing Integrator (Long-Term)
description:
I am a founder and high-level coach building a fast-scaling coaching brand. I do not give step-by-step direction. I operate from vision, patterns, and outcomes.



I am looking for a highly resourceful, self-directed integrator who studies what already exists, understands what works, improves it, and executes with the clear objective of getting qualified coaching clients scheduled on my calendar.



This role requires someone who independently analyzes content, messaging, platforms, and industry leaders, then applies those insights to make my marketing, lead flow, and scheduling more effective — without waiting to be told what to do.



This is not a task-based role. This is an ownership role.



Primary Outcome (Non-Negotiable)



Your core responsibility is simple and clear:



Increase the number of qualified coaching clients scheduled on my calendar.



All work should directly support this outcome.

No random activity.

No busy work.

No disconnected execution.



What You Are Responsible For

Client Acquisition & Scheduling



• Ensure qualified leads are consistently scheduled on my calendar

• Manage follow-up, confirmations, and movement from interest to booked call

• Track what is working and refine the process



Marketing Optimization (Self-Directed)



• Study my existing content across YouTube, LinkedIn, Instagram,
, and TikTok

• Identify patterns, gaps, and opportunities to improve effectiveness

• Repurpose, schedule, and optimize content to drive leads

• Ensure newsletters are consistent, aligned, and sent on time



Strategic Observation & Modeling



• Independently study high-level coaches and online educators

• Identify what they do well across content, offers, lead flow, and calls-to-action

• Apply relevant strategies in a way that fits my brand and voice

• Bring insights and recommendations proactively



Integration & Systems



• Build and maintain simple systems to support consistency

• Document what works and improve execution over time

• Prepare my calendar proactively and intentionally

• Reduce friction for both me and prospective clients



This Role Is NOT For You If:



• You need frequent direction or approval

• You wait to be told what to do

• You execute tasks without understanding outcomes

• You create content or activity without a clear purpose

• You struggle with English comprehension or context

• You dislike ownership or responsibility



This Role IS For You If:



• You learn by studying, observing, and applying

• You understand instructions quickly and deeply

• You enjoy figuring things out independently

• You think in systems, patterns, and outcomes

• You take pride in clean execution and measurable results

• You want to grow with one business long-term



Required Skills & Qualities



• Excellent written English comprehension and communication

• Strong ability to analyze content and messaging

• Experience with social media platforms and scheduling tools

• Comfort managing calendars, links, and follow-up workflows

• High attention to detail

• Strong ownership mindset



Working Expectations



• Part-time: 15–20 hours per week

• Long-term role only that has the ability to go full time when 15 Elite Coaching clients are achieved

• Minimal direction provided

• Independent problem-solving expected

• One explanation should be sufficient



To Apply (Required)



Please answer all questions clearly and thoughtfully:



How do you approach improving something when little direction is given?



Describe a time you studied what already existed and made it more effective.



How do you d
 what actions actually drive results versus busy work?



How do you ensure you fully understand expectations without repeated clarification?



Are you seeking a long-term role? Why?



Applications that do not answer all questions will not be considered.



Final Clarity

title: Business Systems Specialist
description:
We are a US-based Managed Service Provider (MSP) seeking Business Systems Specialist to help build, maintain, and improve the systems that power our day-to-day operations. In this role, you will partner with clients and teammates to understand business processes, translate needs into technical solutions, and deliver automation, reporting, and integrations that scale.

 

The ideal candidate is a strong communicator who can comfortably move between business users and technical implementation. While we use specific tools like Salesforce, Boomi, Power Automate, and Power BI, we are looking for someone with a solid foundation in CRM administration, system integrations, and workflow automation who is eager to learn and master our specific tech stack.

 

Key Responsibilities:

* Workflow Automation

    - Design, build, and maintain automated workflows to streamline business processes.

    - Troubleshoot and optimize existing automations for performance, reliability, and clarity.

    - Implement approval workflows, notifications, data syncs, and operational automations.

* Reporting & Analytics

    - Build and maintain business reports and dashboards based on stakeholder requirements.

    - Connect to data sources, shape data, and create clear visualizations for decision-making.

    - Ensure reporting is accurate, well-documented, and easy for end users to interpret.

* System Integrations

    - Configure and support integration processes across internal systems.

    - Assist with monitoring, error handling, and ongoing integration improvements.

    - Document integration logic, data mappings, and dependencies.

* CRM Administration & Enablement

    - Support CRM setup and configuration (objects, fields, workflows, users/roles, permissions).

    - Assist with data imports, validation rules, reports, dashboards, and user support.

    - Partner with teams to improve adoption and ensure the CRM matches business processes.

* Cross-Functional Support

    - Gather requirements, map current-state and future-state processes, and recommend solutions.

    - Provide clear documentation (process flows, system configs, runbooks).

    - Communicate status, risks, and timelines effectively to both technical and non-technical audiences.

 

Qualifications Required:

* Experience with CRM Systems: Proven ability to support or administer a CRM (e.g., Salesforce, HubSpot, Dynamics, etc.).

* Automation & Integration Experience: Familiarity with building automated workflows and connecting systems (e.g., Power Automate, Zapier, Boomi, MuleSoft, etc.).

* API Knowledge: Basic understanding of APIs (REST preferred), including authentication concepts and data formats (JSON).

* Comfort Working with APIs: Ability to use API documentation to understand how to connect and move data between systems.

* Business Process Knowledge: Strong ability to understand business workflows and translate them into system logic.

* Excellent Communication: Strong written and verbal skills, with a customer-service mindset.



Preferred (Nice to Have):

* Experience with data visualization tools (e.g., Power BI, Tableau, etc.).

* Familiarity with iPaaS concepts (monitoring, error handling, retries, logging).

* Experience working in a ticketing system and documenting changes.

* A proactive, problem-solving mindset with a strong desire to learn new tools and technologies.



Why Join Us?

We believe in creating an environment where our tea
mbers can thrive both professionally and personally. Here’s what we offer:

* Career Growth: Paid certifications, training, and structured onboarding to help you advance your skills.

* Attractive Compensation: Competitive salary, performance-based incentives (monthly profit share and end-of-year bonus), and 13th-month pay.

* Health & Wellness: Monthly healthcare allowance to support your well-being.

* Work-Life Balance: 100% remote work with company-provided equipment.

Supportive Culture: Be part of a forward-thinking team that values collaboration, innovation, and having fun while doing great work.



What Sets Us Apart?

* Performance-Based Rewards: Monthly profit sharing and bonuses for high-performing tea
mbers.

* Continuous Learning: We invest in your growth with paid certifications and training.

* Collaborative Environment: Work with a team that values your input and supports your success.

* Flexibility: Enjoy the freedom of remote work while contributing to impactful projects.



How to Apply:

If you’re ready to take your career to the next level as a Business Systems Specialist, we’d love to hear from you! Apply now and join a team that’s passionate about technology, growth, and delivering exceptional service.



**Submit your application and include the numbers (2004) in your subject line. This helps us ensure you’ve read the full job description.



**Please also attach your updated CV to your application or provide a link to your CV. Applications without a CV will not be considered.



*Currently looking for candidates in NCR or nearby areas of the Philippines.



This is an overnight position. The working hours for this role are 8:00 AM - 5:00 PM CST Monday to Friday.



We look forward to hearing from you!

What we offer:

mber who can grow with us and play an increasingly integral role in our day-to-day production dept.

About Us:

Our Culture and Values:

title: Sales Coordinator
description:
Summary of Position

The Business Development Coordinator supports the Business Development tea
mbers by handling internal coordination, with a strong focus on sampling support and inbound customer communication. This role ensures that customer sample requests are processed quickly and accurately, project data is entered and maintained in systems, and customers receive timely and professional updates. The ideal candidate thrives in a fast-paced environment, is detail-oriented, and communicates clearly with both customers and internal stakeholders.

Essential Job Duties

Sampling & Customer Fulfillment Support

• Receive and support processing of customer sample requests on behalf of sales reps utilizing Imbibe’s project management software.

• Coordinate internal fulfillment, including shipping, lead times, and communication with operations/logistics teams.

• Prepare and submit documentation such as quotes, order forms, or product details.

• Proactively update customers on status, shipping info, and next steps.

• Send follow-up documentation and pricing after sample delivery.

• Track sample inventory and flag risks or delays.



Prospecting Coordination & CRM Management

• Log inbound customer requests and new opportunities into CRM with complete and accurate details.

• Assign or escalate inbound leads to appropriate sales personnel.

• Build and maintain targeted prospect lists using CRM, LinkedIn, industry databases, and other research tools.

• Support the Business Development team with lead qualification through background research on companies, decision-makers, and industry trend via tools like LinkedIn and Wiza.

• Maintain organized, up-to-date records on accounts and project statuses.



Internal Communication & Process Coordination

• Serve as a liaison between Sales, R&D, and Customer Service to ensure aligned timelines and deliverables.

• Identify and help implement workflow improvements for sampling and sales admin processes.

• Maintain shared resources (e.g., sample request trackers, sales templates, documentation libraries).

• Coordinate internal kickoff and check-in meetings.



Minimum Qualifications

title: Appointment Setter
description:
About the Role



The company is looking for a professional, articulate, and engaging Appointment Setter to join our team. This is a vital role within our client journey; you will be the first point of contact for attendees who have expressed interest in our services after the seminars.



Your primary objective is to build rapport with these individuals, answer preliminary questions, and successfully book them into a consultation with one of our expert consultants.



Working Hours & Commitment



Please note that we are looking for dedicated full-time employees to grow with the company.

•Commitment: We do not accept applications for part-time, freelance, or project-based work.

•Hours: 9:00 AM – 5:00 PM UK Time (Monday to Friday).

•Break: Includes a 30-minute paid lunch break.

•Note: Please ensure you are comfortable working on the UK time zone shift (afternoon/evening Philippine time) before applying.



Technical Requirements



To ensure compatibility with our internal systems and maintain a high standard of professional communication, the following technical setup is strictly mandatory:

•Hardware: You must have a Windows laptop/PC (Intel Core i5 or higher). Please note that Mac computers are not compatible with some of the essential software we use for work.

•Audio: You must already possess a good quality noise-cancelling headset to ensure clear, professional calls with our clients.

•Connectivity: A stable primary internet connection is required.

•Redundancy: You must have a backup internet source (e.g., a secondary ISP or reliable mobile hotspot) and a backup power solution (e.g., a power station or UPS) to ensure zero downtime during power outages.



Key Responsibilities



•Post-Seminar Outreach: Proactively contacting seminar attendees via telephone to follow up on their interest.

•Diary Management: Coordinating and booking appointments into the consultants' calendars.

•CRM Maintenance: Ensuring all client interactions and appointment details are recorded accurately.

•Brand Representation: Acting as a professional ambassador for C&W, maintaining a warm and helpful tone at all times.



Benefits & Culture



We value our team and offer a comprehensive benefits package to support your work-life balance:

•Holiday Entitlement: 28 days of annual leave (inclusive of 8 Bank Holidays and 20 paid holidays). All holiday entitlement is pro-rated.

•Wellness & WFH Benefits: Dedicated wellness support and Work From Home (WFH) benefits to ensure a comfortable and productive environment after passing the probationary period.

•Ongoing Growth: A full range of additional benefits will be discussed during the induction training for successful candidates.



Application Requirements

To be considered for this role, please provide the following:

1.Your Resume

2.Loom/Video Introduction: A 3-5 minute video recording (please note: a voice recording alone is not sufficient) answering the following:

      o Introduce yourself.

      o Describe your professional background.

      o Explain why you believe you would be an excellent fit for this specific role at C&W.

      o Are you okay with the salary we stated here on OLJ, specifically a Php 50,000-60,000/monthly salary?



How to Apply



Please submit your application and the requirements listed above strictly via OnlineJobs.ph (OLJ).



Important Note: We kindly ask that you do not send applications directly to our company's mailbox. Any applications sent via
 will not be considered; please use the OLJ platform to ensure your application is reviewed by the team.

title: Business Operations VA — Corporate Admin, Financial Tracking, SOP Execution
description:
About the Role

We are a Virginia-based consulting and real estate firm building business credit profiles across a portfolio of five companies. This is a structured, long-term operations role — not creative work, not marketing, not customer service. You will follow a detailed Standard Operating Procedure (SOP) every day, track everything in a Google Sheet Master Tracker, and submit a written daily report at 4pm ET.

 

This role is ideal if you are the kind of person who reads instructions carefully, follows them exactly, and feels satisfaction when every field in a spreadsheet is filled in correctly. If you prefer variety and creative problem-solving, this is not the right role for you.

 

What You Will Be Doing

• Running a full audit of multiple business entities against a 28-item checklist — verifying state registrations, addresses, phone listings, and corporate documents

• Submitting business credit applications in a specific sequence (vendors, bureau registrations, DUNS filings) following a step-by-step SOP

• Managing a Google Sheets Master Tracker with 8 tabs — logging every task, every vendor account, every credit application, and every bank balance entry

• Calling vendors, credit bureaus, phone providers, and state agencies using provided phone scripts to verify information and follow up on applications

• Monitoring and logging the daily bank balance in a Wells Fargo business account and calculating the 30-day average daily balance each week

• Sending a structured daily written report at 4pm ET every weekday and a weekly sprint review every Friday

• Paying vendor invoices 10 days before the due date on every account and logging payment dates precisely

• Filing and organizing all documents in a Google Drive folder system — every document named and saved on the same day it is obtained

 

What We Are Looking For

? 2+ years experience as a VA or operations assistant — not social media or creative work

? Excellent written English — your daily reports go directly to the company principal

? Strong Google Sheets skills — you must be able to build and maintain a multi-tab tracker from instructions

? Comfortable making phone calls in professional English — we provide all scripts

? Available 9am–5pm ET, Monday–Friday — this is required, not preferred

? Reliable internet connection and dedicated workspace — no coffee shops or coworking spaces for this role

? History of long-term client engagements — we are looking for someone who stays

 

This Is NOT the Right Role If:

? You prefer creative, varied, or marketing-focused work

? You need flexibility on your schedule or can't commit to US Eastern Time hours

? You've never maintained a structured tracking spreadsheet

? You prefer to figure things out yourself rather than follow a written SOP

? You have less than 2 years of professional operations or admin experience

 

What We Offer

• $700–$950/month full-time — paid biweekly via Wise or PayPal

• Full SOP, training document, and worked examples provided — you will never be left guessing what to do

• Direct communication with the company principal — no middleman

• Long-term engagement with room to take on more responsibility as we scale to additional entities

• Performance review at Day 15, Day 30, and monthly — clear expectations, clear feedback

title: Construction Estimator (Flooring Specialist)
description:
We are seeking a full-time, dedicated Construction Estimator (Flooring Specialist) to support a growing commercial flooring business. This role focuses on reviewing outsourced estimates, managing RFIs, and ensuring all plans, scope details, and final proposals are fully aligned before submission.



You will act as an internal quality control and coordination specialist, helping improve communication turnaround, reduce errors, and ensure accuracy across a high volume of commercial bids.



This role is ideal for someone with hands-on flooring estimating experience, strong attention to detail, and the ability to work efficiently in a fast-paced environment.



Key Responsibilities



- Review bids, takeoffs, and plans prepared by an outsourced estimation team

- Manage the RFI (Request for Information) process:

- Identify discrepancies, missing information, or scope conflicts in plans

- Send RFIs to customers or project contacts

- Follow up to ensure timely responses

- Perform detailed quality checks to ensure the project scope aligns with plans and final proposals

- Coordinate communication between the outsourced estimators and internal project managers

- Respond to internal questions regarding plans, specifications, and scope details

- Track clarifications, revisions, and updates to ensure nothing is missed

- Handle a high volume of bid reviews with speed and accuracy



Requirements

Required: Proven experience in commercial flooring estimation (must-have).



Strong understanding of:



Flooring materials, systems, and installation methods

Flooring terminology, specifications, and scope interpretation

Experience performing quantity takeoffs

Ability to read and analyze construction plans and identify discrepancies

Excellent written and verbal English communication skills

Highly detail-oriented with a strong quality-control mindset

Ability to work independently and manage multiple deadlines

Must be reliable and looking for long-term stability



Tools & Platforms

Measure Square ( Must Have )





Benefits:

Job security and stability

Career growth opportunities & performance reviews

Fun and supportive remote work environment



Work Schedule

Monday to Friday

8:00 AM – 5:00 PM EST (client business hours)

Remote



How to Apply

/english

After submitting, reply with: “application form done”

title: Medical Billing Assistant & Backup Virtual Assistant (Mental Health – SimplePractice)
description: I own a growing behavioral health clinic in the United States and I am looking for an experienced Medical Billing Assistant who can also serve as a backup Virtual Assistant when needed. This position requires strong experience with U.S. mental health billing and the SimplePractice platform. The primary responsibilities include monitoring insurance claims, posting payments from EOBs, verifying insurance benefits through payer portals, tracking patient balances, and following up on unpaid claims. The right candidate must also be comfortable assisting with virtual assistant tasks such as scheduling support, maintaining billing trackers, and helping with administrative tasks when the primary VA is unavailable. Applicants must have prior experience working with a mental health clinic, understand behavioral health billing workflows, and be familiar with navigating multiple insurance payer portals. This is a part-time position for at least 5 hours per day and you must be able to work during U.S. daytime hours. Occasional Saturday availability may be required. Strong organization, attention to detail, and excellent written English are essential. Because this role involves working with protected health information, applicants must understand HIPAA privacy requirements and handle patient information responsibly. To confirm that you read this entire posting, please start your application with the phrase “Balance & Bloom Billing Assistant” and briefly describe your experience with SimplePractice, mental health billing, and the payer portals you have worked with.

ssages

Think in systems, not posts



Use Notion as a second brain (not just a task list)
