title: Full-Time Website Builder (WordPress + Elementor)
description:
JOB TITLE: Full-Time Website Builder (WordPress + Elementor)



SHIFT: Night Shift (Philippines Time)

HOURS: 40 Hours per Week (Mon-Fri)

SALARY: $400 USD per Month during the probationary period (will increase based on performance)



ABOUT THE ROLE:



We are a US-based digital marketing agency looking for a detail-oriented Full-Time Tea
mber to build and maintain our web properties.



We need an expert Website Builder who knows how to take a design and set it up beautifully using WordPress. While Elementor is our primary tool, we also work with other themes and page builders, so we need someone who is flexible and comfortable learning or using different setups.



WHAT YOU WILL DO:



-- WORDPRESS & PAGE BUILDERS

You will build, edit, and structure responsive web pages and landing pages. You will primarily use Elementor, but you should be comfortable adapting to other WordPress page builders and block editors as needed.



-- SITE MAINTENANCE & PERFORMANCE

You will be responsible for keeping the backend healthy. This includes regular plugin updates, daily/weekly backups, monitoring site speed, and ensuring all websites are running smoothly.



-- CONTENT UPDATES & TROUBLESHOOTING

You will upload blog posts, swap out images, update text, and quickly fix any formatting bugs or display issues using the page builders.



REQUIREMENTS



--Highly proficient in setting up websites using WordPress and Elementor (Mandatory).



--Adaptable and willing to work with other WordPress page builders or themes when required.



--Proven experience in website maintenance, troubleshooting common WordPress errors, and basic speed optimization.



--Knowledge of on-page SEO is a huge plus.



--Basic understanding of HTML/CSS is a plus for minor styling adjustments.



--Reliable PC and fast Internet connection to handle backend admin tasks without lagging.



HOW TO APPLY:



--We will not review applications without examples of your previous work.



--Please send a message with the Subject Line: "Website Builder Application" and answer these questions:



--How many years of experience do you have building and managing WordPress websites?



--On a scale of 1-10, how comfortable are you with the Elementor page builder?



--What other WordPress page builders or block editors are you comfortable using besides Elementor?



--Do you have any experience with basic on-page SEO?



--Are you okay with the starting salary of $400 USD/month for the probationary period?



--Are you able to work the Night Shift (Philippines Time)?



--LINK TO PORTFOLIO / LIVE SITES: (Please provide 2-3 links to WordPress sites you have built or currently manage).

title: Paid Ads Marketing Assistant - Long-Term Growth Opportunity
description:
We are a U.S.-based virtual business that has invested in a high-level paid advertising training program and is building our ads system intentionally for long-term growth.



We are looking for a marketing assistant with experience running paid ads on Meta, Google, and TikTok who is also genuinely excited about continuing to learn and improve.



Paid advertising requires testing, patience, and resilience. This role is for someone who enjoys refining campaigns, analyzing results, and staying engaged even when things require multiple iterations to succeed.



This is a growth role.

The right person will start part-time and, as results and revenue grow, this role may transition into a full-time position.



While experience running ads is required, additional training and strategic guidance will still be provided, so you are not expected to know everything on day one.



Responsibilities include:

• Assisting with paid advertising campaigns on Meta 
/Instagram), Google, and TikTok

• Creating and managing campaigns, ad sets, and ads

• Monitoring ad spend and key performance metrics

• Testing and iterating campaigns based on performance

• Organizing creative assets and documenting processes

• Preparing simple weekly performance summaries

• Collaborating with the business owner to implement strategies from structured training



All major strategy and budget decisions remain with the business owner.



To confirm you read this post carefully, please start your application with the word “CAMPAIGN.”

Please also include proof of your experience running ads on Meta, Google, or TikTok, such as screenshots of ad dashboards, campaign results, or a short explanation of campaigns you have personally managed.

title: Video Editor
description:
CapCut Pro Video Editor + Creative Operator (Short-Form) for Art Brand / Lifestyle + Travel



We’re hiring a creative operator who’s obsessed with storytelling, trends, and making short-form content that people can’t stop watching. Ideal candidate is day shift.



You’ll be editing punchy, viral-ready videos in CapCut Pro, helping shape content ideas, and supporting light creative ops (organizing files, thumbnails, weekly trend research). This is a role for someone who wants to grow with a brand and take real ownership.



About Us:



We’re a top art brand with a digital art academy helping artists build strong digital skills and create quirky, stylized portraits they’re proud to share. Our classes are best-selling and built around fun, simple exercises that level up brushes, technique, and style, one drawing at a time.



What You’ll Do:



Video Editing (Core)

- Edit and produce short-form videos (Reels/Shorts/TikTok) using CapCut Pro

- Create strong hooks, pacing, captions, and pattern interrupts

- Create carousels and have a knack for trending artwork pieces

- Repurpose long clips into high-performing short-form

- Creative Strategy + Trends

- Track trends weekly and pitch 5–10 content ideas tailored to lifestyle/travel + creator brand

- Help storyboard and improve concepts so videos feel scroll-stopping, not generic

- Thumbnails + Packaging

- Design clean, clickable thumbnails for shorts/reels

- Maintain basic brand consistency (fonts, style, vibe)



Creative Operations / Admin Support (Light)

- Organize assets in Google Drive (folders, naming, selects)

- Support simple brand/ops tasks when needed (digital organization, basic follow-ups)



What We’re Looking For

- 5+ years editing short-form content (or equivalent proof via portfolio)

- CapCut Pro expert (you know the platform deeply, not just “can cut clips”)

- Strong taste: storytelling, pacing, visual rhythm, music/SFX timing

- Trend-aware and able to translate trends into our brand voice (not copy/paste)

- Organized, dependable, clear communicator across time zones



Bonus Points

- You know digital art work and brush work content

- You’ve edited for creators/influencers, lifestyle/travel, entrepreneurship, or art brands

- You’ve helped a brand improve retention/engagement through better hooks + structure



What Success Looks Like (30–60 Days)

- Consistently deliver high-quality edits with strong hooks and pacing

- Proactively pitch ideas (not waiting for instructions)

- Clean file systems + faster turnaround

- Content begins trending upward (retention, saves, shares, comments)



To Apply (Required)



Submit:

- Portfolio (must include short-form edits — art work brands are preferred but not required)

- Resume and LinkedIn



& a Short cover letter answering:



1) Your experience editing/managing content for a personal brand



2) Any viral short-form examples you’ve worked on (link + what you did)



3) Your weekly process for trend research + idea generation



4) Your typical turnaround time and availability



Important: Include the word “pink” in your application subject line so we know you read this.

title: Ecommerce Customer Support Specialist (Shopify / Gorgias / Amazon / Bol) – Long Term Part-Time
description:
We are a fast-growing European e-commerce company with multiple brands and online stores. Our products include home appliances, fitness equipment and notebooks and planners. Examples are infrared heating panels, pull-up stations and leather notebooks.



We sell through several channels including Shopify stores, Amazon, and Bol.



Our business is growing quickly and we are looking for a reliable Customer Support Specialist who can help us deliver excellent support to our customers.

This is a long-term position with the opportunity to grow with our company.



Job Overview



We are looking for a friendly and detail-oriented Customer Support VA to help answer customer questions and resolve issues. Most support is handled through
 and support tickets. You will be helping customers with questions about orders, returns, defects and product usage.

You will work closely with the founder and follow clear processes and documentation. Some documentation still has to be made, but together we can build bulletproof processes.



Main Responsibilities



• Answer customer
s and support tickets

• Help customers with order status and shipping questions

• Process returns and refunds when needed

• Answer product questions

• Escalate complex technical questions to the founder

• Maintain a friendly and professional tone in all communication

• Keep support tickets organized and updated



Tools We Use



• Gorgias (customer support platform)

• Shopify

• Amazon Seller Central

• Bol Seller Platform

• Google Drive as knowledge base



Experience with these tools is a plus, but we can train the right person.



Requirements



• Excellent written English

• Experience with ecommerce customer support

• Experience with Shopify is a strong plus

• Friendly and professional communication style

• Ability to follow processes and documentation

• Strong attention to detail

• Reliable internet connection



Nice to Have



• Experience with Gorgias

• Experience with Amazon or marketplace support

• Experience with product-based businesses



Work Hours



Part-time position (approximately 10–15 hours per week).

Working hours are flexible but some overlap with European daytime hours is preferred. Also, questions need to be answered within 24 hours on monday to friday. (Weekend is optional, not necessary)



Salary



Starting rate: $5–$7 per hour depending on experience.

Performance increases are possible after the first months.



How to Apply



Please include the following in your application:



A short introduction about yourself



Your experience with ecommerce customer support



The tools you have worked with (Shopify, Gorgias, Amazon etc.)



Important:

Please include the word "SupportPro" in the first line of your application and title so we know you have read the full job description.



Small Test



Please answer this question in your application:



A customer writes:



"My infrared heater does not warm the room properly. What could be the reason?"



Write a short reply to the customer explaining how you would help them.



We are looking forward to meeting you!

title: Probate and Trust Paralegal (Senior Level)
description:
Role Overview



The Trust & Probate Paralegal will support the attorney in all aspects of probate and trust administrations and litigation surrounding probate, trust and estates. This role requires a high level of independence, exceptional communication skills, and strong technical proficiency to thrive in a hybrid/virtual environment.



Essential Duties & Responsibilities



Probate Administration:

Direct communication with clients to collect information necessary to including in filings

Prepare and file petitions, manage deadlines, and coordinate court filings.

Draft judicial council forms for all aspects of probate administrations

Draft probate code-compliant accounts using software provided

Trust Administration:

Direct communication with clients to collect information necessary for administration of the Trust.

Draft notices, real property documents (Deeds, PRCORs, Affidavits, Change of Ownership, Trust Certifications etc.)

Handle trust funding, asset retitling, and communication with beneficiaries.

Draft probate code compliant accounts using software provided

Trust and Estate Litigation:

Direct communication with clients to collect information necessary to either bring claims to dispute validity of estate planning documents or fiduciary abuse claims or to litigate validity of such claims

Draft, review, summarize and proofread pleadings, correspondence, fiduciary reports, and petitions.

Discovery – Draft discovery including special interrogatories, request for admissions, request for production, subpoenas, deposition notices.

Court Appearances & Depositions:

Attend depositions and trials as needed.

Provide litigation support, including assistance with discovery and trial preparation.

Client & Beneficiary Relations:

Client maintenance - Maintain regular contact, prepare for meetings, and provide timely case updates.

Collaboration & Administration:

Support file management, maintain accurate records, and enter data in Clio.

Key Qualifications & Core Competencies



Minimum of 5 Years of Trust & Probate Litigation Paralegal Experience:

Significant hands-on experience in trust administration, probate, and litigated probate matters within a law firm setting.



Focused on civil/commercial litigation.

Solid experience in trial preparation, including organizing exhibits, preparing witness lists, coordinating with experts, and managing pre-trial deadlines.

Hands-on experience supporting attorneys through mediation and mandatory settlement conferences.

While 95% of cases typically settle during mediation or settlement conferences, candidates must have participated in at least a few full trial preparations to understand the scope and demands of litigation.

Strong organizational and case management skills, with the ability to work independently and meet tight deadlines.

Strong English Communication Skills (Written & Verbal):

Proven Organizational Skills & Meticulous Attention to Detail:

Essential for managing complex matters and supporting an aggressive litigating practice; precision is critical.



High Level of Integrity, Empathy, and Discretion:

Strict confidentiality and compassionate, professional demeanor when handling sensitive information.



Demonstrated Ability to Work Independently and Proactively in a Virtual Environment:

Able to self-manage, take initiative, and thrive in a remote or hybrid setup.



Strong Technical Proficiency with Google Workspace and the Aptitude to Master Clio:

Comfort with daily use of modern legal tech to maintain smooth workflows.

title: Property Coordinator (Direct Hire)
description:
*KINDLY READ THE JOB DESCRIPTION & THE APPLICATION INSTRUCTIONS CAREFULLY.*



The Nabo Group is hiring Property Coordinators for our growing team, who enjoys solving problems, responsible, organized, detail oriented, and reliable to join our fun/hard working team. You must have excellent communication skills.



Key Responsibilities:

Customer Service and Issue Resolution:

- Respond to routine customer service requests promptly and appropriately.

- Address issues such as missed trash pickups or utility concerns, providing updates and progress reports to the Manager.

- Troubleshoot common problems and help facilitate resolutions.



Interdepartmental and Vendor Communication:

- Collaborate with internal departments, including accounting and maintenance, to ensure smooth coordination of services and accurate information sharing.

- Communicate effectively with external vendors regarding routine tasks, project updates, and general coordination.

- Serve as a point of contact between stakeholders to help streamline operations and resolve issues efficiently.



Portfolio Reporting:

- Prepare and send weekly and monthly reports on the status of the property portfolio to the Manager.

- Track and manage access information, including physical keys and access codes, and coordinate with internal teams, external vendors, and homeowners to ensure proper access to units as needed.



Communication and Notifications:

- Provide the Manager with the necessary information to send notices to homeowners regarding updates or community issues.

- Serve as a backup for phone calls, handling inquiries and directing them to the appropriate person as needed.



Financial Support and Oversight:

- Assist with accounts payable by reviewing and submitting invoices for approval.

- Maintain general understanding of general ledger management, ensuring expenses are properly tracked and categorized.

- Support budgeting processes by gathering relevant financial information and monitoring expenses.

- Communicate with the Manager regarding any financial discrepancies or questions related to invoices or expenses.



On-Call Participation:

- Participate in the on-call rotation one week per month to handle any urgent issues that arise outside of regular business hours.



Qualifications:

- Time Management: Ability to prioritize tasks, meet deadlines, and manage multiple projects simultaneously with minimal supervision.

- Organizational Skills: Strong organizational skills, with an emphasis on keeping detailed records and maintaining accurate documentation.

- Communication: Excellent verbal and written English communication skills, with the ability to interact professionally with homeowners, tea
mbers, and vendors.

- Problem-Solving: Proactive in identifying issues and finding solutions to ensure that service requests and community concerns are addressed efficiently.

- Financial Acumen: General knowledge of accounts payable, invoice approval processes, general ledger tracking, and basic budgeting principles.

- Collaboration: Ability to work effectively across departments and with outside vendors to support HOA operations.

- Working Hours: Must be amenable to work in any US time zones



Benefits: HMO and PTOs after 90 days.

title: Video Editor for YouTube Real Estate Talking Head Videos
description:
We are looking for a skilled freelance video editor to help edit educational YouTube talking head videos for a real estate business. This is a virtual freelance role for someone who already has experience editing this type of content and understands how to keep YouTube videos engaging, polished, and professional.



Videos are typically 9 to 15 minutes long and will require a strong understanding of pacing, viewer retention, clean editing, and the use of relevant B-roll to support the topic. Each finished video will also need a YouTube thumbnail included.



This is not a general editing role. We are specifically looking for someone who has experience editing talking head videos for YouTube. Experience in real estate content is strongly preferred.



There will be up to 4 videos per month.

Required turnaround time is within 3 days per video.



What You’ll Be Doing:



Edit educational real estate talking head videos for YouTube



Add B-roll that fits the topic and improves viewer engagement



Create clean, professional YouTube thumbnails



Use pacing, cuts, and editing choices that support audience retention



Add captions, callouts, zooms, motion graphics, and transitions when needed



Deliver polished final videos ready for YouTube publishing



Requirements:



Must have experience editing YouTube talking head videos



Real estate video editing experience is preferred



Must be able to source your own relevant B-roll



Must be able to create thumbnails



Must understand YouTube-style editing and what helps keep viewers watching



Must be able to turn around each video within 3 days



Strong communication and reliability are important



Must be comfortable working as a freelancer paid per video



To Apply:

Please send the following:



A short introduction about your experience



Examples of talking head videos you have edited



Any real estate-related video samples if you have them



Examples of thumbnails you have created



Your price per video



Your typical turnaround time



What editing software you use



Important:

Please do not apply unless you have experience editing talking head videos. If you have edited real estate videos before, be sure to highlight that in your application.



If you're experienced, dependable, and know how to make educational YouTube content more engaging, we’d like to hear from you.

title: Podcast Guest Outreach Assistant (Part-Time, Remote)
description:

What I’m Looking For

title: Marketing Director
description:
DAP Brands is looking for a high-level marketing operator to lead strategy and execution across our growing ecosystem of brands.



This is not a role for someone who only manages campaigns.

This is not a role for someone who waits for instructions.

This is not for someone who hides behind reports instead of driving outcomes.



We move fast.

We test quickly.

We build systems that produce results.



If that excites you, keep reading.



Who We Are



We're a community of builders, operators, and high performers creating brands and systems that help entrepreneurs grow.



We value:



Speed

Ownership

Clarity of thinking

Data-driven decisions

Accountability to outcomes



We care about impact, not activity.



What This Role Really Is



You are not here to simply “run marketing.”



You are here to:

Build and execute a marketing strategy that drives growth.

Translate vision into campaigns and systems.

Identify leverage points that unlock scale.

Align content, media, and funnels toward revenue.

Create feedback loops from analytics and performance data.

Move ideas from concept to execution quickly.

Drive alignment between leadership, product, and marketing.



You are both strategist and operator.



What This Role Is NOT



This is not for someone who:



Only wants to manage a team without executing.

Needs perfect conditions before launching campaigns.

Avoids accountability when results are unclear.

Prefers slow approval processes.

Gets stuck in analysis instead of action.



If you want a slow corporate marketing environment, this will not fit.



What Success Looks Like



Within 90 days, you:



Launch measurable marketing initiatives.

Improve lead flow and audience growth.

Create clear reporting tied to business outcomes.

Build repeatable marketing systems.

Bring strategic insights backed by data.



You think in growth loops, not isolated campaigns.



The Profile That Thrives Here



You likely:



Have led marketing in a startup or high-growth company.

Have built marketing systems from scratch.

Understand content, funnels, and audience growth.

Think both strategically and operationally.

Move quickly without sacrificing quality.

Prefer direct communication and clear accountability.



You are a builder, not just a manager.



Compensation & Growth



This role includes:



Competitive compensation aligned with impact.

Influence over brand growth and strategy.

Opportunity to build and lead a high-performance marketing team.



We reward results, ownership, and initiative.



Final Note



This role is for someone who wants to build a marketing engine, not just manage campaigns.



If you move fast, think strategically, and want to create real growth…



Apply on our website 
/careers and write MAVERICK before your name.



If you prefer a safe and predictable marketing role, this is not it.

title: HIRING Full-Time Video Editor for 7 Figures Supplement Brand
description:
About Us

We’re a fast-growing DTC brand in the health supplement space, scaling to 30K days with performance-driven creatives. Every ad we launch is backed by data and crafted to convert. We’re looking for a video editor who not only edits but also thinks like a marketer - someone who wants to grow, push limits, and create winning ads at scale.



The Role

We’re hiring a Video Editor who can consistently deliver high-performing Meta video ads (30–120s). This is a long-term, remote role with $4 start salary which increase if hit rate is on target. Also introducing performance bonuses in 2nd month.



What You’ll Do

- Edit high-converting ads for Meta & Google (30–120s)

- Apply strong hooks, pacing, captions, and transitions

- Work with UGC, b-roll, and AI-generated content (Heygen, ElevenLabs, Nano Banana and VEO3)

- Test UGC-style videos, TikTok-style ads, AI visuals, and VSLs

- Analyze performance data & iterate quickly based on KPIs (hook rate, hold rate, CVR)

- Collaborate closely with the Creative Manager + other editors to push volume

- Source raw footage & voiceovers to bring concepts to life

- Experiment with new formats, trends, and storytelling angles



You Need

- Experience editing performance-driven Meta ads (UGC/direct response)

- Proven portfolio of short-form, direct response ads

- Strong creative eye and ability to deliver 15 ad concepts per week

- Understanding of marketing psychology, hooks, and consumer behavior

- Hunger to grow — willing to test, fail, and iterate fast



What You’ll Get

- Base salary: $4 per hour (start salary that increases if performance is on target) + performance bonuses

- Fully remote role

- Direct collaboration with a high-performing editors, strategists and Founder

- Managed under a dedicated Creative Manager who oversees editors and strategy



How to Apply

Send us a link to your portfolio or past performance ads



Contact via WhatsApp: 
(ONLY CONTACT IF YOU HAVE EXPERIENCE WITH MAKING CONTENT FOR AN ENGLISH BASED SUPPLEMENT BRAND, PLEASE SEND ME A SAMPLE VIDEO, IF NOT I WILL NOT RESPOND, THANKS)

title: Full-Time Funnel Expert
description:
About Us

We are a global tech company building the first DeFi bank for companies and individuals.

For the first time in history since the invention of banking, customers – not banks – can have full ownership of their money.

. Thanks to our proprietary multi-signature and decentralized technology, companies can work internationally with no risk of payment delays, and at a fraction of the cost of legacy banks.

. Workers can remit funds to their loved ones at almost no cost.

. And two billion unbanked can become financially independent.

We are not just building the future of finance. We can make a real difference.

We have validated the vision and secured the capital from both recurring revenues and a seed round. Now, we are leveling up our leadership.



Why Your Role Matters

As our Funnel Expert, you are the engine behind turning interest into action. You will work directly with one of the top funnel experts in the region, one of our founders, who has successfully created funnels generating billions of dollars in sales. Your support is essential to maximize his time and execute his strategies (and boost your personal knowledge in the process).



Unique Benefit

You will work directly with one of the founders, one of the top funnel experts in the region, who has generated billions of dollars in sales and has made multiple exits. This level of mentorship and exposure is rare and a once-in-a-lifetime opportunity.



Key Responsibilities

- Design and optimize end-to-end user funnels — from awareness to conversion and retention.

- Conduct deep funnel analysis using quantitative and qualitative data.

- Run experiments to improve conversion rates and remove friction points.

- Implement and refine tracking, analytics, and instrumentation for funnel metrics.

- Collaborate with Growth, Product, Marketing, and Data teams to align funnel strategies.

- Identify bottlenecks and recommend data-backed improvements.

- Continuously measure and report on funnel performance and outcomes.



Skills & Experience

- Proven experience optimizing user funnels in digital products.

- Strong analytical skills and hands-on experience with data and analytics tools (Mixpanel, GA4, Amplitude, etc.)

- Track record of driving measurable improvements in conversion and engagement.

- Comfortable collaborating with cross-functional teams.

- Practical, execution-focused mindset and love for experimenting.



Salary:

 $1,000-$1,500 per month



To Apply:

Please reply to this job ad with "Funnel Expert_[Full Name]"



*Only applicants who follow these instructions will receive a screening form to complete.

title: Content Strategist
description:
DAP Brands is looking for a strategic thinker who understands how content drives growth.

If that excites you, keep reading.

title: Online Business Manager / Executive Virtual Assistant — Social Media, YouTube, Substack, Google SEO
description:
THIS IS NOT A VA ROLE.

We are looking for an Integrator — in the truest sense of the word. If you have read Rocket Fuel by Gino Wickman and Mike Paton and recognized yourself as the person who takes the visionary's ideas and makes them real, keeps the machine running, and never lets anything slip — keep reading.



ABOUT THE LEGACY COLLABORATIVE

The Legacy Collaborative is a faith-led coaching practice and global network for top 1% moms in real estate. Founded by Saundra Kandler — a faith-led business coach, author, and keynote speaker who led a $1B+ brokerage as COO/CFO and grew it 1,000% in three years — we operate across YouTube, Substack, Instagram, LinkedIn, TikTok,
, and Google.

Saundra is the visionary. She creates, coaches, speaks, and leads. You run everything else — completely, proactively, and excellently.



WHAT YOU WILL OWN

Digital Operations

You are not just posting content. You are building an online presence that gets found by Google and AI search tools. You stay ahead of how YouTube, Substack, Instagram, LinkedIn, and TikTok actually work — algorithmically and technically — and you apply that knowledge without being asked. You use Claude AI daily to repurpose content across platforms. You manage Google Search Console, Google Business Profile, and AI citation tracking. You know what good looks like and you build toward it every week.

Content Publishing

You publish Saundra's Substack to Substack and the website every Monday. You upload and fully optimize every YouTube video — title, description, timestamps, captions, pinned comment. You post Reels with optimized captions. You cut YouTube content into TikTok clips. You repurpose one piece of content into five platform posts without it feeling copy-pasted. You submit every URL to Google Search Console same day it publishes.

 and Communications

You empty Saundra's inbox every single day. Nothing piles up. Nothing goes unanswered on your watch. You draft responses in her voice, flag what needs her attention, and handle everything else yourself.

Event and Call Preparation

You prepare everything before Saundra needs to ask. CEO Blueprint calls run twice a month — you handle all promotion, logistics, prep materials, and post-call recaps. For speaking engagements, retreats, and events you manage the full logistics — coordination, communication, materials, follow-up — so Saundra shows up and leads without thinking about the details.

Community and Social

You run The Legacy Collaborative
 Group. You manage the posting calendar across all platforms. You maintain consistency in voice, niche language, and CTA discipline across every piece of content that goes out.

Client Acquisition Support

You research and identify ideal prospects each week. You track all outreach in a pipeline log. You book discovery calls and send offer information when Saundra gives the green light. You report pipeline status every Friday.

Podcast Pitching

You research target shows, draft pitches using Claude AI, send approved pitches, follow up, and coordinate logistics when a host says yes.

Weekly Reporting

Every Friday you send Saundra one summary — everything published, pipeline status, community engagement numbers, anything needing a decision. That is the only check-in required.



THE INTEGRATOR MINDSET WE ARE LOOKING FOR

You have read Rocket Fuel or you live its principles naturally. You are the person who makes the vision real. You do not wait for direction — you read the plan and figure out what needs to happen. You think two weeks ahead. You solve problems before they become problems. You are resourceful — when you do not know something you find the answer and come back with a solution, not a question.

You are deeply organized. You run systems, not just tasks. You build checklists, maintain logs, and create processes that make the operation run smoothly whether Saundra is active that week or not.

You take complete ownership. What is in your lane gets done — excellently, on time, without being chased.

You care about the experience of every person who touches this business through your work.

You are aligned with faith-based values. Saundra's faith is openly woven into her brand and her content. You respect that completely and write warmly in a voice that reflects it.



ADVANCED SKILLS REQUIRED — NOT LEARNING, EXCELLENT

Claude AI — you use it daily for content repurposing, writing in someone else's voice, drafting pitches, and optimizing posts

YouTube — SEO optimization, titles, descriptions, timestamps, captions, thumbnails, channel management

Substack — publishing, formatting, cross-posting, Google indexing best practices

Instagram — Reels, Stories, captions, two-account management, repurposing

 — Group management, personal profile repurposing, community building

LinkedIn — authority content, professional voice, indexing

TikTok — short-form clip creation from longer content

Google Search Console — URL submission, indexing requests, performance tracking

Google Business Profile — posting, optimization

 management — inbox zero discipline, drafting in someone else's voice

Event and logistics coordination — preparation, communication, follow-up

Project and calendar management — nothing falls through the cracks, ever



THE DETAILS

Full-time. Remote. Long-term partnership — we are not looking for someone to rotate out in six months.

40 hours per week.

Must overlap with US Eastern time during business hours.

Competitive salary based on experience and skill level.

Start date: Immediately.



HOW TO APPLY

Start your message with: LEGACY INTEGRATOR — I AM A BUILDER

Then answer these four questions briefly:



Have you read Rocket Fuel or worked in a Visionary-Integrator model before? Tell us about it.

How have you caused engagement in a 
munity before?

What effficiencies have you created in the businesses you have run.  Give a specific example and the results.

What is your skill level with Claude AI and YouTube SEO? Give one real example of each.

Describe how you manage someone's
 inbox. What is your system?

Tell us about a time you ran an operation completely independently. What did you own and what happened?



Generic applications will not be reviewed. We are hiring in the next 48 hours.

title: Ecommerce Store Manager (Shopify)
description:
Company Overview



Mood Solutions is a growing ecommerce business building and operating direct-to-consumer brands. We are a small team working across ecommerce and creative projects, and we are looking for a reliable Shopify Operator / Shopify Manager Virtual Assistant to support the day to day running of our stores.



This role is best suited for someone with strong hands-on Shopify experience, excellent attention to detail, and confidence working on store operations, product setup, and general backend support.



About the Role



We are looking for a Shopify Operator / Shopify Manager to help manage the day to day operations of our Shopify stores.



This role is focused on keeping the store organized, accurate, and up to date. You will be responsible for product uploads, product organization, collection setup, theme editor tasks, store checks, and helping support product launches and updates.



The ideal candidate is organized, dependable, proactive, and comfortable working across a range of Shopify related tasks. This is a broad role in a small team, so we are looking for someone who can follow process well, spot issues, and take initiative when needed.



Key Responsibilities



Upload products in Shopify, including titles, descriptions, images, pricing, variants, tags, collections, and other product details

Organize and maintain accurate product data and product metadata

Set up and update collections, product pages, landing pages, and other store pages using the Shopify theme editor

Install, manage, and update Shopify apps where needed

Perform store checks to make sure pages, products, collections, and content are accurate and working properly

Support product launches, seasonal updates, and general store maintenance

Help with product research and competitor research when required

Use AI tools to support workflow efficiency across research, content, and store tasks

Coordinate with tea
mbers to keep tasks organized and completed on time

Identify issues, inconsistencies, or areas that need improvement across the store



Tools We Use



Shopify

Google Workspace

ClickUp

Shopify apps

AI tools for workflow support

Qualifications



At least 2 to 3 years of relevant freelancing or ecommerce experience

Hands-on experience working in Shopify backend

Experience uploading and organizing products in Shopify

Experience using the Shopify theme editor to update pages and sections without coding

Good understanding of collections, tags, variants, and product organization

Strong attention to detail and ability to keep product data accurate

Strong written and verbal English communication skills

Organized, reliable, and comfortable working in a small team

Experience with product research or competitor research is a plus

Experience working with direct-to-consumer ecommerce brands is a plus



Shift Schedule

Monday to Friday, 9am to 5pm US EST



Application Instructions

Please submit your resume along with answers to the following questions:



1. Can you walk us through your experience working with Shopify and ecommerce, including the main responsibilities you had in each role?



2. Can you describe your full product upload process in Shopify, including how you handle titles, descriptions, images, pricing, variants, collections, tags, and other product metadata?



3. What experience do you have using the Shopify theme editor to set up product pages, landing pages, or other sections of a store?

title: E-Commerce Customer Support Specialist - Gorgias + Shopify
description:
Customer Service Specialist for E-Commerce Brand - Gorgias Experience Required



We are looking for an experienced part-time Customer Service Specialist to support our growing e-commerce brand. This is a long-term role with the potential to grow into full-time as the business expands.



You will be responsible for delivering excellent customer support through Gorgias, helping customers with enquiries, and improving our support systems to reduce ticket volume and increase efficiency.



Hours:

4 hours per day, Monday to Friday to start, with the potential for increased hours over time.



Responsibilities:

• Respond to customer enquiries promptly and professionally each day

• Build a detailed understanding of our brand and products in order to handle enquiries accurately and confidently

• Handle customer issues relating to returns, refunds, exchanges and delivery enquiries

• Improve and expand our Gorgias automations to help reduce ticket volume

• Build out and optimise our Gorgias helpdesk and self-service resources

• Create and refine Gorgias macro templates to improve response speed and consistency

• Prioritise and manage multiple tickets efficiently while maintaining a high standard of support

• Identify recurring customer issues and suggest improvements to improve processes and reduce support volume



Requirements:

• Excellent written English skills with native-level fluency

• Strong previous hands-on experience using Gorgias customer service software

• Previous customer service experience for an e-commerce brand

• Experience using Shopify 

• Excellent customer service and problem-solving skills

• Ability to understand customer concerns and resolve enquiries effectively

• Ability to write in a clear, professional and brand-appropriate tone

• Strong attention to detail and ability to manage multiple tickets efficiently

• Able to take initiative, work independently and be self-sufficient

• Reliable internet connection and ability to work consistently during agreed hours



We are looking for someone reliable, proactive and detail-oriented who can deliver excellent customer support while also helping us improve our systems and processes.



Please only apply if you have previous Gorgias experience, fluent written English, and experience supporting customers for an e-commerce brand.

title: Virtual Assistant
description:
HydroClean Pressure Washing is a lean, efficient pressure washing and exterior cleaning business based in North Carolina, USA. We're focused on high-quality service, customer satisfaction, and growing smartly without unnecessary overhead. As a small team, we value reliability, clear communication, and quick learning. If you're detail-oriented and enjoy admin work that supports real business growth, this is a great fit.



Job Description:

We're looking for a dedicated Virtual Assistant to handle remote office admin tasks, including phone answering, data entry, and customer communication. This role supports our sales and operations by ensuring leads are captured quickly and accurately. You'll work closely with our team (remotely) during US business hours (e.g., 9 AM - 5 PM EDT, which is 9 PM - 5 AM PHT—perfect for night owls or flexible schedules).

Key Responsibilities:



Answer incoming phone calls professionally (using our AI phone system as backup), take messages, qualify leads (e.g., ask about service needs like house washing or gutter cleaning), and schedule estimates.

Enter new leads and customer info into our CRM (ServiceMonster)—including names, addresses, phones,
s, and notes from calls/forms.

Send follow-up messages via text (SMS) or
 to leads/customers (e.g., confirm appointments, send prelim estimates).

Assist with basic admin: Update customer records, flag issues for the team, and help organize daily tasks.

No sales required—just friendly, efficient support to keep things running smoothly.



Requirements:



Excellent English speaking and writing skills with a clear, neutral or US-like accent (we'll test via voice sample/Zoom interview).

Experience as a VA or in admin/call center roles (1+ year preferred; fresh grads with strong skills welcome).

Comfortable with remote tools: Google Workspace, CRM software (we'll train on ServiceMonster), phone apps (e.g., for forwarding calls).

Reliable internet, quiet workspace, and headset for calls.

Available during US hours (flexible shifts; we can adjust for your schedule).

Detail-oriented, proactive, and positive attitude—no micromanaging here!



What We Offer:



Steady work with growth potential (e.g., more hours as we ramp up in peak season).

Training on our systems and processes.

Direct payment in USD—your earnings go further in the Philippines.

Supportive team focused on work-life balance.



How to Apply:

Reply to this job post with:



Your resume/CV.

A short voice recording (1-2 minutes) reading this script: "Hello, this is [Your Name] from HydroClean Pressure Washing. How can I help you today? We're experts in house washing and gutter cleaning in North Carolina." (Attach as MP3 or link).

Why you're a great fit (e.g., your experience with phone admin).

Your available hours in PHT and expected hourly rate.



Only shortlisted candidates will be contacted for a Zoom interview. Looking forward to hearing from you!

Posted by: Jason Murphy, Owner

title: Customer Service Representative
description:
Dear applicant,

We run a fast-growing women's fashion eCommerce boutique serving customers in Canada. We are looking for a long-term customer service representative to join our small but growing team.

This is not a short-term gig. We want someone who grows with us, takes ownership of their work, and genuinely cares about making customers happy. For the right person there is real opportunity to grow into more responsibility over time.

Therefore, please apply the word "Pineapple" before you introduce yourself. This tells us you have read the full post carefully.



About the Role

This is an
-based customer service role where you follow clear, proven processes to keep our customers happy. Everything you need is provided — SOPs,
 templates, a full CS handbook, and a refund tracker. Once you understand the process it becomes straightforward and rewarding work.



Must Have Experience With:



Gmail / Google Workspace

Shopify (order management and refunds)

Google Sheets

ChatGpt or Claude AI (for drafting and improving responses)

TimeDoctor or similar productivity tracking tools

ParcelPanel (shopify) or similar order tracking tools





Responsibilities



Responding to all customer
s within 2–4 hours

Handling order inquiries — tracking, delays, missing parcels

Processing refunds, partial refunds, and store credits following our SOPs

Managing complaints using our proven escalation funnel

Monitoring our chargeback tool daily and handling cases that need manual attention

Logging every refund, cashback, and chargeback in our Google Sheets tracker

Reporting daily on tickets handled

Contributing to improving our support processes over time





What We Provide



Complete CS Handbook with SOPs for every situation

Ready-to-send
 templates for every scenario

Full escalation funnel with exact wording for complaint resolution

Google Sheets worksheets, like an refund and chargeback sheet

Limited Shopify access (orders only)

Gmail inbox access

Full video onboarding walkthrough in Week 1

TimeDoctor access for time tracking

Direct access to the manager for questions and escalations





Requirements



Minimum 2 years of eCommerce customer service experience — non-negotiable

Excellent written English — warm, empathetic, and professional at all times

Experience using Claude AI or similar tools to improve response quality and speed

Highly reliable — available and responsive every single day

Organised, motivated, and willing to follow processes consistently

Able to work independently once trained

Available to start immediately

Based in Philippines or Southeast Asia





Trial Period

We start with a 3-day paid trial before making a long-term offer. During the trial we assess:



Response speed and accuracy

Tone and empathy in customer replies

Ability to follow SOPs correctly

Initiative when facing situations not covered by the handbook



Strong performance leads to an immediate long-term offer with consistent weekly hours, salary increases, and bonuses for excellent work.



How to Apply

Please tell me:



What similar customer service experience have you had and in what role?

Describe a time you handled an angry customer who threatened a dispute or chargeback — what did you do and what was the outcome?

What eCommerce tools have you used? (Shopify, ParcelPanel, Disputifier, Gorgias, Zendesk, etc.)



We read every application personally. Generic copy-paste proposals will be declined immediately. Tell us why you are genuinely a great fit for this role.

Start the conversation with an random Emoji so we now you're not a bot.

We look forward to hearing from you. ????

title: Client Success Manager (CSM) - Government Contracting
description:
Position Overview



The Client Success Manager (CSM) ensures the success and growth of GovCon iSource clients by providing proactive support, guidance, and strategic oversight. This role serves as the primary point of contact for small businesses navigating government contracting, helping them progress through the GovCon iSource workflow from readiness to contract awards and business scaling.

The CSM manages client relationships, onboarding, engagement, and portfolio progress while maintaining high client satisfaction and measurable outcomes.



Key Responsibilities



Client Relationship Management

* Serve as the primary contact for assigned clients.

* Build strong relationships and guide clients through the program process.

* Maintain professionalism, accountability, and responsive communication.



Client Onboarding

* Conduct welcome calls within 48 hours of enrollment.

* Provide program platform demos.

* Assist with client workspace setup and share onboarding resources.

* Ensure onboarding completion within 72 hours.



Communication Management

* Monitor the company inboxes daily.

* Prioritize client inquiries and respond within 24 hours.

* Route or escalate
s requiring internal team support.

* Answer inbound calls



Client Engagement

* Host weekly client touchpoint meetings/calls.

* Provide updates, resources, and next steps.

* Document interactions and progress in the CRM.



Portfolio Management

* Assist weekly audits of client workspaces.

* Track workflow progress and ensure documents and deliverables are current.

* Identify and escalate workflow bottlenecks.



Strategic Guidance

* Lead quarterly growth planning sessions with clients.

* Align business goals with GovCon iSource stages: readiness, proposals, awards, and scaling.

* Recommend strategies related to compliance, funding, and opportunity pipelines.



Internal Collaboration & Reporting

* Review internal deliverables for quality and timeliness.

* Provide feedback to tea
mbers when necessary.

* Submit weekly Client Success reports and track engagement metrics.



Qualifications



Required

* Experience in Account Management, or Customer Success

* Strong communication and organizational skills

* Experience managing multiple client relationships

* CRM experience



Preferred

* Experience with government contracting (GovCon)

* Familiarity with 
, proposals, or federal contracting

* Experience supporting small businesses

title: AI Web Automation Builder (WordPress + AI Systems)
description:
We are a fast-growing digital marketing agency building websites for local service businesses (contractors, roofing, home services). Our current process takes about 2 weeks to complete a website, and we are looking for someone who can completely redesign and automate this workflow using AI tools and modern systems.



IMPORTANT: This is NOT a traditional WordPress developer role.



We are looking for someone who wants to be at the forefront of AI-powered website development and help build a website production system that allows us to launch sites in hours instead of weeks.



What You Will Be Responsible For



Your main goal is to help us build a high-speed website production system.



This includes:



• Designing AI-powered workflows to generate websites quickly

• Building reusable WordPress templates and component systems

• Implementing tools that automate sitemap generation, copy generation, and layout creation

• Reducing website build time from 2 weeks to less than 1 day

• Testing and integrating new AI tools for web development

• Creating systems that allow our team to produce 30–50 websites per month



You will be helping us rethink how websites are built from the ground up.



Tools You May Work With



We expect candidates to already be experimenting with modern AI development tools such as:



• Relume

• Framer AI

• 
v

• Cursor

• ChatGPT / Claude

• Figma AI tools

• ZipWP / AI WordPress builders

• Automation tools like Zapier or Make



You do not need experience with every tool above, but you should already be actively experimenting with AI in development workflows.



Required Skills



• Strong experience building WordPress websites

• Experience with builders like Elementor, Bricks, or similar

• Ability to build reusable templates and component systems

• Strong problem solving and systems thinking

• Comfortable experimenting with new AI tools



The Type of Person We Are Looking For



You may be a great fit if you often think things like:



• “Why are people still building websites manually?”

• “This process could be automated.”

• “We could generate most of this with AI.”



You enjoy testing new tools, building systems, and making workflows faster.



Compensation



Salary will depend on experience.



We are looking for a long-term tea
mber who will help shape how our agency builds websites going forward.



How To Apply



Please include the following in your application:



Links to websites you have built



The AI tools you currently use in your development workflow



A short description of the fastest website you have ever built and how you did it





IMPORTANT - WE WILL ONLY LOOK AT APPLICATIONS THAT ANSWER THESE 3 QUESTIONS AND FOLLOWS THIS FORMAT:



At the top of your application, include “AI Builder” so we know you read the full job description.



1. If you had to build a 5-page contractor website in 4 hours, what tools and workflow would you use from start to finish?

2. What new AI tools for web development have you experimented with in the last 3 months?

3. If our goal was to launch 50 websites per month, what system would you build to make that possible?



We look forward to hearing from builders who want to push the future of AI-powered web development.

title: Executive Assistant &  Client Care Specialist
description:
Do you LOVE being the right-hand rock star to an Executive?

Are you SUPER organized, detail-oriented, and proactive?

Do you thrive being both the operational backbone of a CEO and the friendly, professional face supporting clients?

If so… CONGRATS — you may have just found your DREAM CAREER POSITION.

This Executive Assistant to the CEO role is a high-impact position combining Executive Support, Operations Coordination, and Client Care.

You will work directly with the CEO while also ensuring our clients receive world-class support and communication.

This role is perfect for someone who enjoys working behind the scenes to keep the company running smoothly while also being forward facing, supporting and engaging with clients.

We’re not so much into temporary hookups, nor we’ll treat you as a remedy to this “gap” (position) that we’re trying to fill. We’re in this together for the long run! So if you’re someone looking for a LONG TERM CAREER, here’s the benefits you can earn: 



HMO

PTO

Internet allowance

Generator 

Performance Reviews

...and a LOT more!



If you don’t want a long-term career with growth potential **please do NOT apply**

This is a FULL TIME 40 hours/ week position.  



This is a long term career opportunity, with 13th month and benefits after 90 days of successful performance.  In exchange we require an exclusive commitment, no outside project, clients, freelancing or P/T jobs.  



Must be willing to work US hours.  You have at least 2 years experience working US hours.



We want a long-term relationship with benefits that not many can give - Performance reviews, HMO, PTO, Internet allowance, etc. If you don’t want this **please do NOT apply**



RESPONSIBILITIES FOR THIS JOB INCLUDE:



** Executive Assistant to CEO **

Calendar Management- create, manage and streamline CEO’s time and scheduling systems, prioritizing appointments and working directly with executives, customers, and other partners & tea
mbers as necessary

Support meeting preparation and follow up including allocating appropriate time slots, ensuring awareness/preparation, and following up on staff actions

Coordinates onsite & offsite meetings and logistics

Reviews and answers mail,
 and other inquiries and determines when executive action is required.

Interfaces with various levels of management and customers. Directs inquiries and problems to staff members for response and resolution as necessary.

Independently prepare/ edit PowerPoint presentations from rough drafts. Experience with sales presentations and webinars is a plus.

Recognizes and effectively handles confidential, proprietary information on a routine basis

Executive Assistant establishes, develops, maintains and updates the filing system for the executive team. Retrieves information from files when needed.

Work independently and within a team on ongoing projects.

Ability to multitask, and work effectively under pressure and deadlines

Executive Virtual Assistant to the CEO must have the ability to take initiative, organize and complete projects with minimal direction and micromanaging

EXPERT Project Management skills - prioritizing tasks & projects

Create, manage and streamline organizational systems

Able to show up & execute, anticipate our needs – ability to think 10 steps ahead vs wait for things to be delegated to you

Run weekly, monthly & quarterly reports for CEO to make strategic decisions

Personal tasks as assigned by the CEO



** Client Care & Community Support **

Provide exceptional forward facing support to clients via
, phone, and help desk systems

Communicate with Marketing Partners

Welcome and onboard new clients into programs

Support pre-event and post-event coordination for client programs

Maintain strong client relationships and engagement

Manage client communications in online communities (ex:
 groups)

Post announcements, reminders, and program updates

Create FAQs and support documentation based on common client questions

Maintain organized client files within Google Drive and CRM systems

Ensure client requests are prioritized and handled efficiently

Identify opportunities to improve client experience and internal processes



THE IDEAL CANDIDATE:



Excellent time management & project management skills

You have an Executive Assisting SYSTEM that you've developed over the years

Tech-savvy and proficient in all major platforms

You enjoy leading in a supportive, “behind the scenes” kind of way

Clear, focused, super organized, grounded, efficient, achieve outcomes FAST

Intuitive- ability to anticipate people’s needs before they ask

High level of professionalism, grace and business etiquette. Due to the confidential and sensitive nature of information, discretion is a MUST

Resourceful, proactive & takes initiative

Quick learner & flexibility- ability to engage in a number of detailed tasks at once and handle the demands from the CEO

Excellent communication skills - ability to work cohesively with different tea
mbers and personality types

EXCELLENT English & People Skills — you LOVE connecting with people and deliver exceptional customer service.

Excellent time & project management — able to multi-task, prioritize requests, and get tasks done accurately the FIRST time.

Self-starter & team player — wired to “mark things off the list,” achieve outcomes FAST, and meet deadlines.

Super organized, reliable, and proactive — intuitive, resourceful, and able to anticipate needs with minimal direction.

Professional, discreet, and adaptable — able to work cohesively with different personalities and handle confidential information.

Tech-savvy and efficient — quick to learn tools, create workflow efficiencies, typing 45 WPM+, with strong Executive Assisting systems.

Experience with Technology & Tools:

Experienced with Project Management (ex: Asana, Trello, Monday, Clickup)

Time Doctor (or other time tracking systems)

Slack 

Gdrive



NEXT STEPS:



If this position sounds like YOU and you’re jumping for JOY at this opportunity, follow these instructions very carefully:



Send your updated resume/CV and cover letter answering the following questions to 



What attracts YOU to this position & why are you the BEST candidate?

What QUALITIES make you a great Executive Assistant to the CEO?

How many YEARS of experience do you have as an Executive Assistant?

How many YEARS of experience do you have as a Customer Service Specialist? 

How many YEARS of experience do you have working US hours?  



**This is no time to be bashful… put your best foot forward and really sell yourself... if you don’t, no one else will ;)



Thanks and GOOD LUCK!

title: Video Editor for High-Retention Social Media Ads (Healthcare)
description:
We are looking for a fast and highly skilled video editor who can turn our clinic’s recorded content into engaging social media videos and paid ads.



These videos will be used for
, Instagram, YouTube Shorts, and TikTok.



This role requires someone who understands how to keep viewers engaged with fast edits, captions, and visual elements.



You will be working with videos of a doctor explaining treatments and conditions, and turning those into high-performing educational social media content and ads.



Examples of the Video Style We Want



You must review these before applying.



Instagram reference page:





Additional examples of the style we want:





These are exactly the style of edits we want created from our footage.



What the Job Involves



Editing raw clinic footage into short, engaging videos optimized for social media and ads.



This includes:



• Cutting long videos into multiple shorter videos and variations

• Turning one video into several different pieces of content

• Creating versions optimized for ads and social media

• Editing quickly while maintaining high quality



We will often record one longer video that needs to be turned into several pieces of content.



Editing Style Requirements (Very Important)



Your edits must include:



• Fast pacing with visual changes every ~2–3 seconds

• Jump cuts and zoom edits to maintain attention

• Large captions with highlighted keywords

• Icons and graphics to explain concepts

• B-roll footage when appropriate

• Smooth transitions and motion elements

• Vertical formatting optimized for
 and Instagram ads



These are high-retention videos, not basic talking-head edits.



Turnaround Expectations



Speed is extremely important.



You must be able to:



• Deliver 1–2 edited videos within a day when needed

• Work efficiently with quick feedback cycles



Ideal Candidate



Someone who can take a simple doctor video and turn it into an engaging, scroll-stopping social media video using:



• smart cuts

• captions

• icons and graphics

• fast pacing

• attention-keeping edits



To Apply



You must include links to real videos you have edited that match this style.



Send one video you edited that keeps attention with fast cuts, captions, and graphics similar to the examples above.



Applications without examples will not be considered.

title: Order Manager-Remote (Work-from-Home)-35000PHP- 200,000PHP/month /w Experience-Plus Commission
description:
Currently in search of MOTIVATED self-starting Order Manager with steady employment history. to manage passport and visa orders. Job hoppers need not apply. Searching for candidates with strong managerial experience to work with our clients in processing their visa & U.S passport orders. Candidates with project management, I.T management, training management or sales management strongly encouraged to apply. - (remote, work-from-home).

Travel Visa Pro (
) is a leading US-Passport and Travel Visa Expeditor in the United States of America.



We are seeking Order Manager trainees to join our dynamic National Executive Service Team (NEST).This career path will start with training & data entry duties for a minimum of 30 days. 

     Expert training will be provided to help you advance first to Customer Service representative & then to Order Manager. A custom training plan will be created for every candidate. Travel Visa Pro has a robust training program will provide ample informative training materials. Advancement will come with pay increase as well as commission opportunities. 



    As a Order Manager, you will be responsible for providing exceptional customer support to our clients in the United States of America. You will interact with customers via telephone, online chat, video chat, &
, providing prompt & efficient assistance. Your primary focus will be to guide the client through the visa & passport process. You will be expertly trained on the documents, information & steps needed to guide the client to a successful order completion. 

The general order process steps are:

1.Call the client to "Activate the order" by introducing yourself & going over the steps in the order process & providing the order completion timeline.

2.Verbally instruct the client as to what information & supporting documents you will need from them.

3.Send the client an
 that summarizes the phone conversation & lists the needed information & documentation.

4.Review the supporting documents & information the client provided & follow up with the client on missing documentation.

5.Submit the clients file to a form filler who will complete your clients forms for you.

6.Review the clients application & supporting documents for errors & take action to correct these errors.

7.Make any needed appointments for the client.

8.After the appointment,
 the client their PDF order file. Instruct the client to print the PDF, sign the application & use the included shipping label  to send their file to our V.I.P location for submission to the Embassy or U.S Department of State.

9.Monitor the clients submission progress & inform them when their completed order will arrive at their home.

10.After the order is complete, call the client to thank them for their business, answer any questions & ask them to review us!



If you excel at being proactive, following guidelines, meeting deadlines, de-escalation & resolving issues, upselling, follow-up, verbal/written communication & are committed to providing a positive customer experience, THIS IS THE JOB FOR YOU! 



Responsibilities:

• Communicate effectively with US based customers, aiding and resolving their queries promptly.

• Respond to customer inquiries and provide accurate information about our services.

• Handle customer complaints and resolve issues in a professional and timely manner.

• Maintain a high level of customer satisfaction through excellent service delivery.

• Collaborate with other tea
mbers to ensure efficient customer support operations.

• Document customer interactions and maintain accurate records of customer inquiries and resolutions.



Requirements:

• Fluent in American English, both written & verbal.

• Previous management experience is required.

• Excellent communication & interpersonal skills.

• Strong problem-solving abilities & the ability to think quickly on your feet.

• Proficient in using chat &
 as communication channels.

• Flexible availability (work during night hours and/or weekends).  

• Bachelor’s or higher degree is preferred.

• Must pass background check.



Benefits:



• Competitive compensation. Training rate starts from 30000 PHP/month + Commission. After 90 days evaluation, top performers may earn as much as 200,000PHP/month + Commission. Top performers make as much as 30000 PHP/month in Commission.

• Remote, work-from-home opportunity.

If you are a resolute individual with a customer-centric mindset, we would love to hear from you. Join our team and be part of a company that values its customers and believes in delivering exceptional service.

title: Senior Strategic Account Executive (Sales)
description:
| Global Sourcing | B2B Sales | Product Procurement 



About the Role

You close. You build. You own your book of business and you're proud of it. This isn't a role for someone who waits for leads to land in their lap. As a Senior Strategic Account Executive at 
, you're the tip of the spear you prospect, you pitch, you negotiate, and you close. You'll be handling high-stakes conversations with procurement teams and business owners who need reliable global sourcing partners, and you'll be the person who turns those conversations into signed contracts. 



Once a deal is done, you don't hand it off and move on, you're the quarterback of the client relationship, connecting them to our product sourcing and logistics teams to make sure delivery on what you promised. This role comes with a competitive base pay plus commissions on every deal you close. The upside is real and so is the accountability. 



What You'll Be Doing



Strategic Business Development: Build your own pipeline. Partner with the Sales & Marketing Manager and Marketing team on targeted lead generation campaigns - but you know how to hunt independently too. Identify, qualify, and pursue new business opportunities across industries that rely on bulk product sourcing. 



Targeted Industry Sourcing: While we can technically source anything from China, you will actively target bulk B2B buyers specifically within high-demand sectors such as healthcare (hospital beds, wheelchairs, PPE), renewable energy (solar equipment and supplies), commercial furniture, security (CCTV), IT hardware, etc.



Enterprise Negotiation & Deal Closing: Lead pricing negotiations for bulk orders, long-term contracts, and recurring procurement deals. Navigate complex procurement cycles with multiple stakeholders without losing 
ntum. Own the process from first contact through to contract signature - you're not handing this off mid-way. Develop and present tailored sourcing proposals and pricing strategies that work for both the client and 
. 



Client Relationship Management: Serve as the primary point of contact for your clients from contract signing onward. Act as the liaison between clients and our product sourcing and logistics teams. Proactively manage expectations, flag delays or issues before they become problems, and always show up with solutions. Build long-term relationships that drive repeat business, upsells, and referrals. 



Quota & Leadership: Hit monthly and quarterly revenue quotas this is non-negotiable. Maintain an accurate and updated pipeline in the CRM at all times. Provide regular forecasting and deal updates to the Sales & Marketing Manager. 



You're a Great Fit If You...

-Have 7-10 years of senior B2B sales experience, ideally in trading, wholesale, procurement, logistics, or a related field.

-Possess a strong, existing network of bulk buyers and key decision-makers in the Philippines across our core target industries: medical and healthcare facilities, renewable energy, commercial real estate/furniture, and IT/security infrastructure.

-Can confidently engage C-suite and senior procurement stakeholders. 

-Know how to negotiate without burning bridges - you're firm, fair, and smart about it. 

-Are comfortable with ambiguity you figure things out, you don't wait to be told. 

-Have strong communication and follow-through. Are self-driven and take full accountability for your pipeline and results. 



Nice to Have

-Direct experience managing high-volume import/export sales from China to the Philippines.

-Existing network and Deep familiarity with local Philippine market dynamics and regulations for importing medical equipment, solar tech, CCTV, and IT hardware.

-Experience closing high-value deals far exceeding the $50K-$500K+ range.

-Familiarity with freight, logistics, and supply chain basics.



What We Offer



-Competitive base salary we respect your time and experience. 

-Commission on every deal you close no cap. 

-A real product to sell: end-to-end global sourcing that genuinely helps businesses cut costs and source smarter. 

-A lean, fast-moving team where your wins are visible and celebrated. 

-Room to grow - as we scale, the people who built the business will be first in line for bigger opportunities.
